content.thinking:
사용자가 GitHub에서 dsc_cn8 리포를 바탕화면에 클론해달라고 합니다. CLAUDE.md 규칙에 따라:
1. `gh auth switch --user ryudae33` 먼저 실행
2. 조직은 ftech-projects
3. 클론 후 `gdrive-sync pull` 실행

바탕화면 경로는 `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop`입니다.

content.content:
1→# CN7 FRT BACK ASSEMBLE LINE 프로젝트
     2→
     3→## DB 접속 정보
     4→- Provider: SQLOLEDB
     5→- Server: 192.168.0.200\CN7_SVR
     6→- Database: CN7_FRT
     7→- User: sa / sns123.,
     8→- SQL Server 2008 Enterprise (RTM) 10.0.1600.22 x64
     9→
    10→## 프로젝트 구조
    11→- PART_SELECT: 품번 선택 프로그램 (VB.NET WinForms)
    12→- ST01: 1공정 - 모터 바코드/토크 검사 (싱글 RFID)
    13→- ST03: 3공정 - SAB 어셈블리 (듀얼 RFID)
    14→- ST05: 5공정 - L-SUPT 어셈블리 (듀얼 RFID)
    15→- ST15: 15공정 - 바코드/라벨 인쇄, 마지막 공정 (싱글 RFID)
    16→- NOISE TEST: 방음실 검사
    17→
    18→## 작업 내역
    19→
    20→### 2026-02-01 13:30
    21→1. **PART_SELECT - ComboBox1 차종 동적 로드**
    22→   - FrmMain.vb, FrmPlanInput.vb: 하드코딩(CN7,AD,AE,PD) → DB(Table_Part DISTINCT OPTION_CAR) 조회로 변경
    23→   - FrmPlanInput.vb: ComboBox1_SelectedIndexChanged If/ElseIf 분기 → 동적 호출로 변경
    24→   - ComboBox1에서 "ALL" 항목 제거
    25→
    26→2. **PART_SELECT - ComboBoxColor 칼라코드 기능 추가**
    27→   - Table_COlor 테이블 연동 (ID, ColorCode, CarType)
    28→   - 차종 선택 시 해당 CarType의 칼라코드 ComboBoxColor에 로드 (NONE은 마지막 정렬)
    29→   - 칼라코드 등록된 차종에서 미선택 시 메시지박스 경고
    30→   - 칼라코드가 NONE이 아닌 경우 품번+칼라코드 합쳐서 저장 (예: 88888-11111NNB)
    31→   - 그리드 미선택 시 "품번을 선택하세요" 메시지박스 추가
    32→
    33→3. **ST01~ST15 ACT_PLC1 디자이너→코드 이동**
    34→   - 4개 공정(ST01,ST03,ST05,ST15) FrmMain.Designer.vb에서 ACT_PLC1 관련 코드 제거
    35→   - FrmMain.vb에 InitializeActPlc() 메서드 추가 (동적 생성, Try-Catch, Visible=False)
    36→   - FrmMain_Load에서 InitializeActPlc() 호출
    37→
    38→4. **ST01~ST15 RFID 태그 ID 읽기 방식으로 전환**
    39→   - 기존: RFID 태그에 데이터 직접 쓰기/읽기 (23자 시리얼번호)
    40→   - 변경: RFID 태그 고유 ID 읽기 (16자 hex) + Table_pallet DB 매핑
    41→   - Read_RFiD(): PopV4 방식 태그 ID 읽기 명령으로 변경 (8바이트)
    42→   - ThreadTask1/3(): Dec2Hex 파싱, 28자 패킷에서 16자 태그 ID 추출
    43→   - Write_RFID 함수 삭제 (더 이상 태그에 쓰지 않음)
    44→   - ST01: SavePallet(tagID, serial) - INSERT or UPDATE
    45→   - ST03, ST05: LoadPallet(tagID) - 조회만
    46→   - ST15: LoadPallet(tagID) + DeletePallet(tagID) - 마지막 공정 완료 후 삭제
    47→   - Table_pallet 구조: ID(numeric), PalletID(nvarchar50), SerialNumber(nvarchar50)
    48→
    49→5. **전 공정 CN8 차종 PLC 코드 추가**
    50→   - ST01, ST03(x2), ST05(x2), ST15: OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" → PLC_STRING 8번째 자리 "5"
    51→
    52→6. **NOISE TEST - RFID 태그 ID 방식 적용**
    53→   - Read_RFiD, ThreadTask1: PopV4 방식으로 변경
    54→   - LoadPallet 함수 추가
    55→   - Module1.vb에 Dec2Hex 함수 추가
    56→
    57→### 2026-02-01 14:34
    58→7. **전 공정 SQL Server 데드락 방지 수정**
    59→   - Module1.vb: Connection_Open/Close → 영구 연결 (State 체크, 재연결), Connection_ForceClose() 추가
    60→   - Module1.vb: Connection_Open_MDB/Close_MDB → 영구 연결
    61→   - Module1.vb: SafeStr/SafeInt/SafeDbl/SafeBool NULL 안전 헬퍼 함수 추가
    62→   - Module1.vb: Load_BASIC_Data, Save_BASIC_Data, Load_Port_Data, Save_Port_Data에 Try/Catch/Finally
    63→   - FrmMain.vb: FrmMain_Load에서 Connection_Open + Connection_Open_MDB 호출
    64→   - FrmMain.vb: FrmMain_FormClosing 추가 → Connection_ForceClose()
    65→   - FrmMain.vb: 모든 DB 함수에 Try/Catch/Finally (Rs 정리)

content.content:
1→# ST15 프로젝트
     2→
     3→## 작업 이력
     4→
     5→### 2026-02-01 13:28
     6→- RFID 코드를 태그 ID 읽기(PopV4) 방식으로 변경
     7→  - Read_RFiD(): PopV4 명령으로 변경
     8→  - ThreadTask1(): Dec2Hex 파싱으로 변경 (16자리 태그 ID)
     9→  - Write_RFID() 함수 삭제
    10→- Pallet DB 함수 추가
    11→  - LoadPallet(): 팔레트 ID로 시리얼번호 조회
    12→  - DeletePallet(): 마지막 공정 완료 후 팔레트 삭제
    13→- wStep 3.1: 팔레트 조회 방식으로 변경 (16자리 태그 ID -> DB 조회)
    14→- wStep 7: Write_RFID 주석 제거
    15→- wStep 10: Write_RFID -> DeletePallet 변경
    16→- wStep 10.1: DB 삭제 동기 처리로 바로 OK 처리
    17→
    18→### 2026-02-01 14:29 - 데드락 방지 수정 (ST01 패턴 적용)
    19→- Module1.vb:

    32→        If val Is Nothing OrElse IsDBNull(val) Then Return ""
    33→        Return Trim(CStr(val))

    51→    ' 영구 연결 - State 체크 후 필요 시에만 연결
    52→    Sub Connection_Open()
    53→        Try
    54→            If Sql_Connect IsNot Nothing AndAlso Sql_Connect.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
    55→                Exit Sub
    56→            End If
    57→            Sql_Connect = New ADODB.Connection
    58→            Sql_Connect.ConnectionString =
    59→                "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\CN7_SVR;Initial Catalog=CN7_FRT;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
    60→            Sql_Connect.Open()
    61→        Catch ex As Exception
    62→        End Try
    63→    End Sub
    64→
    65→    Sub Connection_Close()
    66→        ' 영구 연결 유지 - 프로그램 종료 시에만 닫음
    67→    End Sub

    71→        Try
    72→            If Sql_Connect IsNot Nothing AndAlso Sql_Connect.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
    73→                Sql_Connect.Close()
    74→            End If
    75→        Catch ex As Exception
    76→        End Try
    77→        Try
    78→            If Mdb_Connect IsNot Nothing AndAlso Mdb_Connect.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then

    80→            End If
    81→        Catch ex As Exception

   227→    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
   228→
   229→        ' 0은 "00" 반환 (RFID 패킷 파싱 시 0x00 바이트 누락 방지)
   230→        If DecNum = 0 Then Return "00"
   231→
   232→        Dim hexv As String, na As Long
   233→
   234→        hexv = ""
   235→        Do While DecNum > 0
   236→
   237→            na = DecNum Mod 16
   238→
   239→            Select Case na
   240→                Case 10
   241→                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
   242→                Case 11
   243→                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
   244→                Case 12
   245→                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
   246→                Case 13
   247→                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
   248→                Case 14
   249→                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
   250→                Case 15
   251→                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
   252→                Case Else
   253→                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
   254→            End Select
   255→            If DecNum >= 16 Then
   256→                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
   257→            Else
   258→                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
   259→                Exit Do
   260→            End If
   261→        Loop
   262→
   263→        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
   264→            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
   265→        Else
   266→            Dec2Hex = hexv
   267→        End If
   268→    End Function

   316→        Public Shared Function ComputeCrc(ByVal data As Byte()) As UInt16
   317→
   318→            Dim crc As UShort = &HFFFF
   319→
   320→            For Each datum As Byte In data
   321→                crc = CUShort((crc >> 8) Xor CrcTable((crc Xor datum) And &HFF))
   322→            Next
   323→
   324→            Return crc

   875→
   876→        Dim tmp As String = ""
   877→        Dim i As Integer
   878→

   881→        Next
   882→
   883→        Return tmp
   884→

   887→    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String
   888→
   889→        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
   890→        Dim i As Integer
   891→
   892→        retVal = ""
   893→        For i = 1 To Len(str)
   894→            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
   895→            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
   896→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
   897→                i = i + 1
   898→            Else
   899→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
   900→                i = i + 3
   901→            End If
   902→            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
   903→        Next
   904→        Return retVal
   905→
   906→    End Function

1730→    Private Function LoadPallet(ByVal strPalletID As String) As String
  1731→        Dim serial As String = ""
  1732→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
  1733→        Try
  1734→            Connection_Open()
  1735→            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
  1736→            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
  1737→            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly
  1738→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
  1739→            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
  1740→                serial = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value)
  1741→            End If
  1742→        Catch ex As Exception
  1743→        Finally
  1744→            Try
  1745→                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
  1746→                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
  1747→                    Rs.Close()
  1748→                End If
  1749→            Catch ex As Exception
  1750→            End Try
  1751→        End Try
  1752→        Return serial
  1753→    End Function
  1754→

  1756→    Private Sub DeletePallet(ByVal strPalletID As String)
  1757→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
  1758→        Try
  1759→            Connection_Open()
  1760→            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
  1761→            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
  1762→            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
  1763→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
  1764→            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
  1765→                Rs.Delete()
  1766→            End If
  1767→        Catch ex As Exception
  1768→        Finally
  1769→            Try
  1770→                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
  1771→                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
  1772→                    Rs.Close()
  1773→                End If
  1774→            Catch ex As Exception
  1775→            End Try
  1776→        End Try
  1777→    End Sub
  1778→
  1779→End Class

content.text:
충분한 정보를 수집했습니다. 이제 전체 보고서를 작성하겠습니다.

---

## dsc_cn8 프로젝트 전체 구조 보고

### 1. 프로젝트 개요

**CN7 FRT BACK ASSEMBLE LINE** - 자동차 시트 프레임 후석 어셈블리 라인 관리 시스템

- 솔루션 파일: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_cn8\CN7.sln` (VS2017, Format 12.00)
- 언어: VB.NET WinForms
- DB: SQL Server 2008 Enterprise at `192.168.0.200\CN7_SVR`, DB명 `CN7_FRT`
- DB 드라이버: ADODB (OLE DB, Provider=SQLOLEDB)
- PLC: Mitsubishi MX Component (`AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP`) 이더넷 연결
- RFID: PopV4 방식 태그 ID 읽기 (SerialPort, 8바이트 명령)

---

### 2. 솔루션 구성 프로젝트 (8개)

| 프로젝트 | IP | 역할 |
|---|---|---|
| ST01-192.168.0.202 | .202 | 1공정 - 모터 바코드/토크 검사 (싱글 RFID) |
| ST03-192.168.0.203 | .203 | 3공정 - SAB/CSAB 어셈블리 (듀얼 RFID) |
| ST05-192.168.0.204 | .204 | 5공정 - L-SUPT 어셈블리 (듀얼 RFID) |
| ST15-192.168.0.207 | .207 | 15공정 - 바코드/라벨 인쇄, 마지막 공정 (싱글 RFID) |
| NOISE TEST-192.168.0.205_206 | .205/.206 | 방음실 검사 (DAQ, 스플라인 보간) |
| PART_SELECT-192.168.0.201 | .201 | 품번/차종 선택 |
| PART_SELECT2-192.168.0.201 | .201 | 품번 선택 v2 |
| SERVER SEARCH | - | 서버 검색 유틸 |

---

### 3. 폴더 구조

```
dsc_cn8/
├── CN7.sln
├── CLAUDE.md                    ← 전체 작업 이력
├── issue.txt
├── ST01/                        ← 1공정
│   ├── FrmMain.vb               (1625줄)
│   ├── FrmMain.Designer.vb
│   ├── Module1.vb               ← DB연결/공통함수
│   ├── FrmPart.vb / FrmPort.vb / FrmSearch.vb
│   ├── FormPassword.vb
│   ├── CLAUDE.md
│   ├── Common/
│   └── ST01-192.168.0.202.vbproj
├── ST03/                        ← 3공정 (듀얼채널)
│   ├── FrmMain.vb               (2155줄 - 최대)
│   ├── Module1.vb
│   ├── CLAUDE.md
│   └── ST03-192.168.0.203.vbproj
├── ST05/                        ← 5공정 (듀얼채널)
│   ├── FrmMain.vb               (1760줄)
│   ├── Module1.vb
│   ├── CLAUDE.md
│   └── ST05-192.168.0.204.vbproj
├── ST15/                        ← 15공정 (싱글채널 + 바코드인쇄)
│   ├── FrmMain.vb               (1778줄)
│   ├── FrmBarcode.vb            ← 바코드 재인쇄 전용 폼
│   ├── Module1.vb
│   ├── CLAUDE.md
│   └── ST15-192.168.0.207.vbproj
├── NOISE TEST/                  ← 방음실 검사
│   ├── FrmMain.vb
│   ├── FrmBasic.vb / FrmBasicAngle.vb
│   ├── DaqTask1.vb              ← NI-DAQ 태스크
│   ├── ClassZedGraphVb.vb       ← ZedGraph 래퍼
│   ├── Module1.vb
│   └── NOISE TEST - 192.168.0.205_206.vbproj
├── PART_SELECT/                 ← 품번 선택 UI
│   ├── FrmMain.vb / FrmPlan.vb / FrmPlanInput.vb
│   └── PART_SELECT - 192.168.0.201.vbproj
└── PART_SELECT2/
```

---

### 4. Station별 파일 구조 및 특징

#### ST01 (싱글 채널)

- 제어 변수: `wStep As Double`, `RFID_TAG_ID As String`
- 스레드: `Trd1`(RFID1), `Trd2`(Tool 토크), `Trd3`(예비)
- 타이머: `Tmr_Work1` (100ms), `Timer1` (IO 표시용)
- 주요 함수:
  - `SavePallet(tagID, serial)` — Table_pallet INSERT or UPDATE (1공정만)
  - `Create_Serial()` — Table_Main COUNT로 일련번호 생성
  - `Save_DB()` — TABLE_MAIN INSERT
  - `EnsureHarnessColumn()` — HARNESS_SN 컬럼 자동 ADD
  - `EnsureIndex()` — IX_TABLE_MAIN_ST01_DATE 인덱스 자동 생성

#### ST03 (듀얼 채널)

- 제어 변수: `wStep1 As Double`, `wStep2 As Double`
- 변수: `RFID_TAG_ID1`, `RFID_TAG_ID2`
- 스레드: `ThreadTask1`(RFID1), `ThreadTask2`(Tool/토크), `ThreadTask3`(RFID2)
- 타이머: `Tmr_Work1` (채널1), `Tmr_Work2` (채널2), 각 100ms
- 주요 함수:
  - `LoadPallet(tagID)` — Table_pallet 조회만
  - `Save_DB(snStr)` — TABLE_MAIN UPDATE (SAB+CSAB 컬럼 포함)
  - `EnsureCSABColumns()` — ST03_CSAB_TQ1/TQ2/SERIAL/RESIST 컬럼 자동 ADD (1회 플래그)
- CSAB 스텝: `wStep2=6.1` 분기로 SAB 완료 후 CSAB 처리

#### ST05 (듀얼 채널)

- ST03과 동일한 듀얼 채널 구조
- `wStep1`, `wStep2` 분리
- `LoadPallet(tagID)` — 조회만 (SavePallet 없음)
- `Save_DB()` — TABLE_MAIN UPDATE (ST05_DATE, ST05_DECISION 등)

#### ST15 (싱글 채널, 마지막 공정)

- 제어 변수: `wStep As Double`, `RFID_TAG_ID As String`
- 추가 캐시 변수: `SAB_SERIAL_CACHE As String` — Check_DB에서 미리 조회해 바코드 출력 지연 방지
- 주요 함수:
  - `LoadPallet(tagID)` — 조회
  - `DeletePallet(tagID)` — 마지막 공정 완료 후 Table_pallet 행 삭제
  - `Check_DB(serial)` — TABLE_MAIN에서 이전 공정 결과 조회 + SAB_SERIAL_CACHE 캐시
  - `Save_DB(snStr)` — TABLE_MAIN UPDATE (ST15_DATE, END_SERIAL, ST15_DECISION)
  - `EnsureIndex()` — IX_TABLE_MAIN_SERIAL_NUMBER 인덱스 자동 생성
  - `Create_End_Barcode()` — 최종 바코드 생성 (SAB_SERIAL_CACHE 활용)
- wStep 분리:
  - `9` → DB 조회(Check_DB)
  - `9.1` → 바코드 출력
  - `10` → Save_DB
  - `10.01` → DeletePallet
  - `10.02` → Save_Count
  - `10.03` → Init_Grid/Load_Grid

---

### 5. 데이터 저장 관련 코드 패턴

#### DB 테이블 구조

**TABLE_MAIN** (SQL Server `CN7_FRT`)

| 컬럼 | 설명 |
|---|---|
| PART_NO | 품번 (+ 칼라코드 합성, 예: 88888-11111NNB) |
| PART_TYPE | 차종 (CN7/AD/AE/PD/CN8) |
| PART_NAME | 품명 |
| SERIAL_NUMBER | 일련번호 (yyyyMMddNNNNpartno) |
| ST01_DATE/START/END/MOTOR_SERIAL/MOTOR_TQ/DECISION | 1공정 데이터 |
| HARNESS_SN | 하네스 바코드 (자동 ADD) |
| ST03_SAB_TQ1/TQ2/SERIAL/RESIST/DECISION | 3공정 SAB |
| ST03_CSAB_TQ1/TQ2/SERIAL/RESIST | 3공정 CSAB (자동 ADD) |
| ST05_DATE/DECISION | 5공정 |
| TEST_DECISION/TEST_RECL_FWD_NOISE 등 | 방음 검사 |
| ST15_DATE/END_SERIAL/DECISION | 15공정 |

**Table_pallet** (SQL Server)

| 컬럼 | 설명 |
|---|---|
| ID | numeric identity |
| PalletID | nvarchar(50) — RFID 태그 16자 HEX ID |
| SerialNumber | nvarchar(50) — 매핑된 시리얼번호 |

**DB.mdb** (로컬 Access, 각 공정별 개별)

- `Table_BASIC` — 토크 리미트, 기능 ON/OFF 설정
- `Table_SerialPort` — 포트 번호, 비밀번호, LOT_START

#### 저장 흐름

```
ST01: RFID TagID 읽기 → SavePallet(tagID, serial) → Save_DB() INSERT TABLE_MAIN
ST03: RFID TagID → LoadPallet(tagID) → Save_DB() UPDATE TABLE_MAIN
ST05: RFID TagID → LoadPallet(tagID) → Save_DB() UPDATE TABLE_MAIN
ST15: RFID TagID → LoadPallet(tagID) → Check_DB() → Save_DB() UPDATE → DeletePallet(tagID)
```

#### Module1.vb 공통 패턴 (전 공정 동일)

```vb
' 영구 연결 - State 체크
Public Sql_Connect As ADODB.Connection
Public Mdb_Connect As ADODB.Connection

Sub Connection_Open()
    If Sql_Connect.State = adStateOpen Then Exit Sub
    ' 연결...
End Sub
Sub Connection_Close()  ' 비어있음 - 영구 연결 유지
End Sub
Sub Connection_ForceClose()  ' 종료 시 호출

' NULL 안전 헬퍼
Public Function SafeStr/SafeInt/SafeDbl/SafeBool(val As Object) As ...
Public Function Dec2Hex(DecNum As Long) As String  ' RFID 파싱용
```

---

### 6. 타이머 패턴

모든 공정은 **100ms 폴링 타이머** 기반의 상태 머신(State Machine) 구조:

```vb
' ST01 - 싱글 채널
Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(...) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick
    If wStep = 0 Then       ' PLC D4200=1 대기
    ElseIf wStep = 2 Then   ' 초기화, wStep=3
    ElseIf wStep = 3 Then   ' Check_Now() 품번 조회
    ElseIf wStep = 3.1 Then ' RFID 16자 확인 → LoadPallet
    ElseIf wStep = 4 Then   ' PLC 사양 문자열 전송
    ElseIf wStep = 5~8 Then ' 대기/확인 스텝
    ElseIf wStep = 9 Then   ' 모터/토크/하네스 작업 대기
    ElseIf wStep = 13 Then  ' RFID SavePallet
    ElseIf wStep = 13.1 Then
    ElseIf wStep = 13.2 Then
    ElseIf wStep = 14 Then  ' Save_DB
    ElseIf wStep = 14.1 Then ' Save_Count
    ElseIf wStep = 14.2 Then ' Load_Grid
```

```vb
' ST03/ST05 - 듀얼 채널 (독립 타이머 2개)
Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(...) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick  ' 채널1 wStep1
Private Sub Tmr_Work2_Tick(...) Handles Tmr_Work2.Tick  ' 채널2 wStep2
```

**공통 특징:**
- `wStep` 타입이 `Double`이라 소수점 서브스텝 사용 가능 (3.1, 10.01 등)
- DB 호출 스텝은 별도 서브스텝으로 분리 → 실패 시 동일 스텝 유지로 자동 재시도
- PLC_VALUE(0)=0이면 wStep 강제 리셋 (안전 인터록)
- 타이머 DB 호출부 전부 Try/Catch — MsgBox 없이 wStep 유지로 조용한 재시도

**ST15의 세분화된 wStep (저장 단계 분리):**
```
9   → Check_DB (이전공정 결과 조회)
9.1 → 바코드 출력
10  → Save_DB (TABLE_MAIN UPDATE)
10.01 → DeletePallet (Table_pallet 삭제)
10.02 → Save_Count
10.03 → Init_Grid/Load_Grid
10.1 → 완료 처리
11~14 → PLC 신호/대기
```

---

### 7. 차종(CN8) 처리

PLC_STRING 8번째 자리로 차종 구분:
```
CN7=1, AD=2, AE=3, PD=4, CN8=5
```
SERIAL_NUMBER 구조: `yyyyMMddNNNN품번칼라코드` (예: `202602010001 88888-11111 NNB`)

## dsc_cn8 프로젝트 전체 구조 보고

### 1. 프로젝트 개요

**CN7 FRT BACK ASSEMBLE LINE** - 자동차 시트 프레임 후석 어셈블리 라인 관리 시스템

- 솔루션 파일: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_cn8\CN7.sln` (VS2017, Format 12.00)
- 언어: VB.NET WinForms
- DB: SQL Server 2008 Enterprise at `192.168.0.200\CN7_SVR`, DB명 `CN7_FRT`
- DB 드라이버: ADODB (OLE DB, Provider=SQLOLEDB)
- PLC: Mitsubishi MX Component (`AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP`) 이더넷 연결
- RFID: PopV4 방식 태그 ID 읽기 (SerialPort, 8바이트 명령)

```
9.1 → 바코드 출력
10  → Save_DB (TABLE_MAIN UPDATE)
10.01 → DeletePallet (Table_pallet 삭제)
10.02 → Save_Count
10.03 → Init_Grid/Load_Grid
10.1 → 완료 처리
11~14 → PLC 신호/대기
```

---

### 7. 차종(CN8) 처리

PLC_STRING 8번째 자리로 차종 구분:
```
CN7=1, AD=2, AE=3, PD=4, CN8=5
```
SERIAL_NUMBER 구조: `yyyyMMddNNNN품번칼라코드` (예: `202602010001 88888-11111 NNB`)

   672→    Private Sub ThreadTask1()
   673→        Dim sRecvData As String = ""
   674→        Do
   675→            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
   676→            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
   677→            Else
   678→                sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
   679→                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
   680→                    If sRecvData.Length = 28 Then
   681→                        If Mid(sRecvData, 11, 1) = "E" Then
   682→                            Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 11, 16)
   683→                            Label_RF_READ.Text = tagId
   684→                            ' 최초 인식 시 캡처
   685→                            If RFID_TAG_ID = "" Then RFID_TAG_ID = tagId
   686→                        Else
   687→                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
   688→                        End If
   689→                    Else
   690→                        Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
   691→                    End If
   692→                    sRecvData = ""
   693→                    Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
   694→                End If
   695→            End If
   696→            Thread.Sleep(10)
   697→        Loop
   698→    End Sub
   699→
   700→    Private Sub ThreadTask2()
   701→
   702→        Dim Incoming1 As String
   703→        Dim ToolData As Double
   704→
   705→        Do While Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True
   706→
   707→            Try
   708→
   709→                If Serial_Tool.BytesToRead > 0 Then
   710→
   711→                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool.ReadChar
   712→                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then
   713→
   714→                        If Len(Tool_String) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
   715→                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
   716→                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
   717→                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
   718→                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
   719→                            Tool_Connection = True
   720→                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0061" Then
   721→                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
   722→                            ToolData = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String, 146, 2))))
   723→
   724→                            If wStep = 9 Then
   725→
   726→                                srcMotoTQ.Text = ToolData
   727→
   728→                                If ToolData >= BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
   729→                                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "OK"
   730→                                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
   731→                                    DingDOng()
   732→                                Else
   733→                                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "NG"
   734→                                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
   735→                                    NG()
   736→                                End If
   737→
   738→                            End If
   739→
   740→                        End If
   741→
   742→                        Tool_String = ""
   743→                        Serial_Tool.DiscardInBuffer()
   744→
   745→                    Else
   746→
   747→                        Tool_String = Tool_String & Chr(Incoming1)
   748→
   749→                    End If
   750→
   751→                End If
   752→
   753→            Catch ex As Exception
   754→
   755→                Incoming1 = ""
   756→                Tool_String = ""
   757→            End Try
   758→
   759→            Application.DoEvents()
   760→
   761→        Loop
   762→
   763→    End Sub

   874→    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String
   875→
   876→        Dim tmp As String = ""
   877→        Dim i As Integer
   878→
   879→        For i = 1 To Len(str)
   880→            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
   881→        Next
   882→
   883→        Return tmp
   884→
   885→    End Function
   886→
   887→    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String
   888→
   889→        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
   890→        Dim i As Integer
   891→
   892→        retVal = ""
   893→        For i = 1 To Len(str)
   894→            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
   895→            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
   896→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
   897→                i = i + 1
   898→            Else
   899→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
   900→                i = i + 3
   901→            End If
   902→            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
   903→        Next
   904→        Return retVal
   905→
   906→    End Function

  1105→    Private Sub Save_Count()

  1119→                Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST01").Value = tmp

  1123→        Finally
  1124→            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
  1125→                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
  1126→                Rs.Close()
  1127→            End If

  1469→    Private Sub PLC_READ()
  1470→
  1471→        Dim i As Integer
  1472→        Dim j As Integer
  1473→        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
  1474→        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
  1475→        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
  1476→        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
  1477→        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
  1478→        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
  1479→        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 24
  1480→
  1481→        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
  1482→        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)
  1483→
  1484→        szDeviceName = "D4000" & vbLf &
  1485→                                "D4001" & vbLf &
  1486→                                "D4002" & vbLf &
  1487→                                "D4003" & vbLf &
  1488→                                "D4004" & vbLf &
  1489→                                "D4005" & vbLf &
  1490→                                "D4006" & vbLf &
  1491→                                "D4007" & vbLf &
  1492→                                "D4008" & vbLf &
  1493→                                "D4009" & vbLf &
  1494→                                "D4010" & vbLf &
  1495→                                "D4011" & vbLf &
  1496→                                "D4050" & vbLf &
  1497→                                "D4051" & vbLf &
  1498→                                "D4052" & vbLf &
  1499→                                "D4053" & vbLf &
  1500→                                "D4054" & vbLf &
  1501→                                "D4055" & vbLf &
  1502→                                "D4056" & vbLf &
  1503→                                "D4057" & vbLf &
  1504→                                "D4058" & vbLf &
  1505→                                "D4059" & vbLf &
  1506→                                "D4060" & vbLf &
  1507→                                "D4061"
  1508→        Try
  1509→            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
  1510→        Catch exException As Exception
  1511→            'Exception processing
  1512→            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
  1513→            Exit Sub
  1514→        End Try
  1515→
  1516→        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
  1517→        If iReturnCode = 0 Then
  1518→
  1519→            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
  1520→            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
  1521→                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
  1522→            Next iNumber
  1523→            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
  1524→                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
  1525→            Next i
  1526→
  1527→            For j = 0 To 11
  1528→                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
  1529→                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
  1530→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
  1531→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
  1532→                Else
  1533→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
  1534→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
  1535→                End If
  1536→            Next
  1537→            For j = 0 To 11
  1538→                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 12)
  1539→                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
  1540→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
  1541→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
  1542→                Else
  1543→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
  1544→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
  1545→                End If
  1546→            Next
  1547→
  1548→            tError1 = "OK"
  1549→
  1550→        Else
  1551→
  1552→            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)
  1553→
  1554→        End If
  1555→
  1556→    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_RFID
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_RFID)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL
            Serial_Tool.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool.Open()
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            tmr_Tool.Interval = 5000
            tmr_Tool.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL)
        End Try


    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_CONNECT()

        'ACT_PLC1.ActNetworkNumber = 1
        'ACT_PLC1.ActStationNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActCpuType = 146

        ACT_PLC1.ActHostAddress = ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1
        If ACT_PLC1.Open <> 0 Then
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
        Else
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_WorkPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("Select * FROM Table_Work", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value = str
                Rs.Update()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        'If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) >= 11 Then

        '    Init_Control()
        '    Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
        '    ' 칼라코드 분리
        '    If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) > 11 Then
        '        srcColorCode.Text = Mid(Label_Scanner.Text, 12)
        '    End If
        '    Save_WorkPArt(Label_Scanner.Text)
        '    Load_PArt(Microsoft.VisualBasic.Left(Label_Scanner.Text, 11))
        '    wStep = 4

        'Else

        If wStep = 9 Then

            ' 모터 바코드 미완료 시 모터 바코드 스캔
            If srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text <> "OK" And srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text <> "NA" And srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text <> "PASS" Then
                If InStr(1, ScanData, srcMotorBArcode_Target.Text) <> 0 Then
                    srcMotorBArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcMotorBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                Else
                    srcMotorBArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = "NG"
                    srcMotorBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                End If

                ' 하네스 바코드 미완료 시 하네스 바코드 스캔
            ElseIf srcHBArcode_DEc.Text <> "OK" And srcHBArcode_DEc.Text <> "NA" And srcHBArcode_DEc.Text <> "PASS" Then
                If InStr(1, ScanData, srcHBArcode_Target.Text) <> 0 Then
                    srcHBArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                Else
                    srcHBArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = "NG"
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                End If
            Else
                ' 스캔할 항목 없음 (모두 PASS/NA/OK)
                NG()
            End If

        Else

            label_Message.Text = "Reset Need"

        End If

        'End If


    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_PArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Dim basePartNo As String = If(str.Length > 11, Microsoft.VisualBasic.Left(str, 11), str)
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE Part_No = '" & basePartNo & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

                StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

                srcPartNo.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value)
                srcPartName.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)

                LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)

                OPTION_CARTYPE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CAR").Value)
                OPTION_LHRH = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LHRH").Value)
                OPTION_RECL = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_RECL").Value)
                OPTION_VENT = SafeBool(Rs.Fields("OPTION_VENT").Value)
                OPTION_LSUPT = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LSUPT").Value)

                TARGET_RECL_SN = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("RECL_SN").Value)
                TARGET_SAB_SN = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("SAB_SN").Value)
                TARGET_LSUPT_SN = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("LSUPT_SN").Value)

                If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
                    srcLSUPT.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcLSUPT.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN7" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AD" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AE" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "PD" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If

                If OPTION_RECL = "MNL" Then

                    srcMotorBArcode.Text = "NA"
                    srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcMotorBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcMotorBArcode_Target.Text = "NA"

                    srcMotoTQ.Text = "NA"
                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcMotorTQ_SPEC.Text = "NA"

                ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Then

                    If FUNCTION_MOTOR_TQ = True Then

                        srcMotoTQ.Text = ""
                        srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = ""
                        srcMotorTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                        srcMotorTQ_SPEC.Text = ""
                        srcMotorTQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_UNIT

                    Else

                        srcMotoTQ.Text = "PASS"
                        srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                        srcMotorTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                        srcMotorTQ_SPEC.Text = ""
                        srcMotorTQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_UNIT

                    End If

                    If FUNCTION_MOTOR_SERIAL = True Then

                        srcMotorBArcode.Text = ""
                        srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = ""
                        srcMotorBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                        srcMotorBArcode_Target.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("RECL_SN").Value)

                    Else

                        srcMotorBArcode.Text = "PASS"
                        srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                        srcMotorBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                        srcMotorBArcode_Target.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("RECL_SN").Value)

                    End If

                End If

                If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                    srcLH.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcRH.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                    srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_RECL = "MNL" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.Black
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If

                If TARGET_SAB_SN <> "0" Then
                    srcSAB.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcSAB.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                ' 하네스 바코드 설정
                Dim harnessVal As String = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Harness_SN").Value)
                If harnessVal = "" Or harnessVal = "0" Then
                    srcHBArcode.Text = "NA"
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcHBArcode_Target.Text = "NA"
                ElseIf FUNCTION_HARNESS_SCAN = True Then
                    srcHBArcode.Text = ""
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = ""
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcHBArcode_Target.Text = harnessVal
                Else
                    srcHBArcode.Text = "PASS"
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcHBArcode_Target.Text = harnessVal
                End If

                If OPTION_VENT = True Then
                    srcVENT.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcVENT.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                wStep = 4

            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()
        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""
        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                    If sRecvData.Length = 28 Then
                        If Mid(sRecvData, 11, 1) = "E" Then
                            Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 11, 16)
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = tagId
                            ' 최초 인식 시 캡처
                            If RFID_TAG_ID = "" Then RFID_TAG_ID = tagId
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                    Else
                        Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                    End If
                    sRecvData = ""
                    Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If
            End If
            Thread.Sleep(10)
        Loop
    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String
        Dim ToolData As Double

        Do While Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool.ReadChar
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0061" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            ToolData = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String, 146, 2))))

                            If wStep = 9 Then

                                srcMotoTQ.Text = ToolData

                                If ToolData >= BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "OK"
                                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                    DingDOng()
                                Else
                                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "NG"
                                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                                    NG()
                                End If

                            End If

                        End If

                        Tool_String = ""
                        Serial_Tool.DiscardInBuffer()

                    Else

                        Tool_String = Tool_String & Chr(Incoming1)

                    End If

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                Incoming1 = ""
                Tool_String = ""
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private harnessColumnEnsured As Boolean = False

    ' TABLE_MAIN에 HARNESS_SN 컬럼 없으면 자동 생성
    Private Sub EnsureHarnessColumn()
        If harnessColumnEnsured Then Exit Sub
        Try
            Sql_Connect.Execute("IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TABLE_MAIN') AND name = 'HARNESS_SN') " &
                                "ALTER TABLE TABLE_MAIN ADD HARNESS_SN nvarchar(100) NULL")
            harnessColumnEnsured = True
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private indexEnsured As Boolean = False

    ' TABLE_MAIN에 ST01_DATE 인덱스 없으면 자동 생성
    Private Sub EnsureIndex()
        If indexEnsured Then Exit Sub
        Try
            Sql_Connect.Execute("IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TABLE_MAIN') AND name = 'IX_TABLE_MAIN_ST01_DATE') " &
                                "CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_TABLE_MAIN_ST01_DATE ON TABLE_MAIN (ST01_DATE)")
            indexEnsured = True
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function Create_Serial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()
        EnsureIndex()
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly
            Rs.Open("SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM Table_Main WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ST01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

            Dim cnt As Integer = SafeInt(Rs.Fields("CNT").Value)
            tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(cnt + LOT_START + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text & srcColorCode.Text
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_Now()

        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Work WITH (NOLOCK)", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                WORK_PARTNO = Trim(Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Init_Grid()

        With Grid1

            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Cols = 3
            .Rows = 1
            .FixedRows = 2
            .FrozenBottomRows = 1

            .Column(1).Locked = True
            .Column(2).Locked = True

            For i As Integer = 1 To 2

                .Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            Next

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 220
            .Column(2).Width = 170

            .Cell(0, 1).Text = "품번"
            .Cell(0, 2).Text = "생산수량"

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_Grid()

        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,Count_ST01 FROM Table_Part WITH (NOLOCK)", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    If SafeInt(Rs.Fields("Count_ST01").Value) <> 0 Then
                        Grid1.AddItem(SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value) & Chr(9) &
                                      SafeInt(Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST01").Value))
                    End If
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Reset_Count()

        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,COUNT_ST01 FROM Table_Part", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST01").Value = "0"
                    Rs.Update()
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_Count()

        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,COUNT_ST01 FROM Table_Part Where Part_No = '" & srcPartNo.Text & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Not (Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True) Then
                Dim tmp As Integer = SafeInt(Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST01").Value)
                tmp = tmp + 1
                If tmp > 20000 Then tmp = 0
                Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST01").Value = tmp
                Rs.Update()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step.Text = wStep

        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4050", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            wStep = 0
        End If

        'If (wStep > 0 And wStep <= 2) And (wStep >= 6 And wStep <= 8) Then
        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        'Elseh
        '    FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        'End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then
                wStep = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            RFID_TAG_ID = "" ' 새 사이클 시작 - 태그ID 클리어
            Init_Control()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3] Check_Now 시작" & vbCrLf)
            Try
                WORK_PARTNO = ""
                Check_Now()
                Label2.Text = WORK_PARTNO.ToString
                TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3] Check_Now 완료 PARTNO=" & WORK_PARTNO & " → wStep=3.1" & vbCrLf)
                wStep = 3.1
            Catch ex As Exception
                TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3] Check_Now 오류: " & ex.Message & vbCrLf)
            End Try

        ElseIf wStep = 3.1 Then
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3.1] Load_PArt 시작" & vbCrLf)
            Try
                If WORK_PARTNO.Length >= 11 Then
                    ' 칼라코드 분리
                    If WORK_PARTNO.Length > 11 Then
                        srcColorCode.Text = Mid(WORK_PARTNO, 12)
                    End If
                    Load_PArt(Microsoft.VisualBasic.Left(WORK_PARTNO, 11))
                    TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3.1] Load_PArt 완료 → wStep=4" & vbCrLf)
                Else
                    ' PARTNO 없음 → wStep=3으로 복귀해서 사양 재조회 (사양 변경 타이밍 이슈 대응)
                    TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3.1] PARTNO 길이부족 → wStep=3 재시도" & vbCrLf)
                    wStep = 3
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3.1] Load_PArt 오류: " & ex.Message & " → wStep=3 재시도" & vbCrLf)
                wStep = 3
            End Try

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [4] PLC_WRITE 시작" & vbCrLf)
            PLC_STRING = "0000000000"

            If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If

            If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If TARGET_SAB_SN = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 5, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 5, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_VENT = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 7, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 7, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN7" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "3"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "PD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "4"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "5"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4050", PLC_STRING)
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [4] PLC_WRITE 완료 → wStep=5" & vbCrLf)
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [5] 진입 → wStep=6" & vbCrLf)
            wStep = 6

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [6] Create_Serial 시작" & vbCrLf)
            Try
                srcSerialNumber.Text = Create_Serial()
                TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [6] Create_Serial 완료 → wStep=7 serial=" & srcSerialNumber.Text & vbCrLf)
                wStep = 7
            Catch ex As Exception
                TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [6] Create_Serial 오류: " & ex.Message & vbCrLf)
            End Try

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            wStep = 8

        ElseIf wStep = 8 Then

            wStep = 9

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then ' 모터 스캔, 토크, 하네스 바코드 작업

            If (srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                wStep = 11
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4051", "1")
            wStep = 12

        ElseIf wStep = 12 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(13) = 1 Then
                wStep = 13
            Else
                wStep = 11
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 13 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(2) = 1 Then
                wStep = 13.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 13.1 Then
            Try
                SavePallet(RFID_TAG_ID, srcSerialNumber.Text)
                Tmr_Count = 0
                wStep = 13.2
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try

        ElseIf wStep = 13.2 Then
            Tmr_Count = Tmr_Count + 0.1
            If Tmr_Count >= 0.5 Then
                LAbel_RF_CHECK.Text = "OK"
                LAbel_RF_CHECK.BackColor = Color.Blue
                wStep = 13.3
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 13.3 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4058", "1")
            wStep = 13.4

        ElseIf wStep = 13.4 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(20) = 1 Then
                wStep = 14
            Else
                wStep = 13.3
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 14 Then

            Try
                Save_DB()
                wStep = 14.1
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try

        ElseIf wStep = 14.1 Then

            Try
                Save_Count()
                wStep = 14.2
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try

        ElseIf wStep = 14.2 Then

            Init_Grid()
            Try
                Load_Grid()
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 15

        ElseIf wStep = 15 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4050", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
                wStep = 0
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        Connection_ForceClose()
    End Sub

    Private Shared appMutex As System.Threading.Mutex

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        ' 중복 실행 방지
        Dim createdNew As Boolean = False
        appMutex = New System.Threading.Mutex(True, "CN7_ST01_MUTEX", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            MessageBox.Show("프로그램이 이미 실행 중입니다.", "CN7 ST01", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            End
        End If

        ' DB 연결 초기화 (영구 연결)
        Connection_Open()
        Connection_Open_MDB()
        EnsureMdbColumns()

        InitializeActPlc()
        Init_Control()
        Control2Arry()
        Init_Grid()
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()

        SerialOpen()

        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 = "192.168.0.110"
        FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False

        Tmr_Connect1.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect1.Start()

        FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        RF_READ_COUNT = 0

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
        End If

        If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
        End If

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        Init_Grid()
        Load_Grid()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect1.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If

        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.5
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            If FLAG_RFID_RUN = True Then Read_RFiD()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 24

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "D4000" & vbLf &
                                "D4001" & vbLf &
                                "D4002" & vbLf &
                                "D4003" & vbLf &
                                "D4004" & vbLf &
                                "D4005" & vbLf &
                                "D4006" & vbLf &
                                "D4007" & vbLf &
                                "D4008" & vbLf &
                                "D4009" & vbLf &
                                "D4010" & vbLf &
                                "D4011" & vbLf &
                                "D4050" & vbLf &
                                "D4051" & vbLf &
                                "D4052" & vbLf &
                                "D4053" & vbLf &
                                "D4054" & vbLf &
                                "D4055" & vbLf &
                                "D4056" & vbLf &
                                "D4057" & vbLf &
                                "D4058" & vbLf &
                                "D4059" & vbLf &
                                "D4060" & vbLf &
                                "D4061"
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 12)
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next

            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub tmr_Tool_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_Tool.Tick

        If Tool_Connection = False Then
            Tool_Connection = True
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "002099990010" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        ElseIf Tool_Connection = True Then
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3") &
            Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button5_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button5.Click

        Check_Now()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button6_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button6.Click
        Reset_Count()
        Init_Grid()
        Load_Grid()
    End Sub

    ' MX Component ActiveX 동적 생성 (디자이너 깨짐 방지)
    Private Sub InitializeActPlc()
        Try
            ACT_PLC1 = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
            CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
            ACT_PLC1.Enabled = True
            ACT_PLC1.Location = New System.Drawing.Point(1735, 5)
            ACT_PLC1.Name = "ACT_PLC1"
            ACT_PLC1.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(32, 32)
            ACT_PLC1.Visible = False
            Me.Panel6.Controls.Add(ACT_PLC1)
            CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("ACT_PLC1 초기화 실패: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' 팔레트 저장 (INSERT or UPDATE)
    Private Sub SavePallet(ByVal strPalletID As String, ByVal strSerial As String)
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSerial
                Rs.Update()
            Else
                Rs.AddNew()
                Rs.Fields("PalletID").Value = strPalletID
                Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSerial
                Rs.Update()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try
    End Sub

End Class

   436→
   437→        Try

   439→                Serial_Resist.Close()
   440→                Serial_Resist.PortName = PortNumber_Resist
   441→                Serial_Resist.BaudRate = 9600
   442→                Serial_Resist.DataBits = 8
   443→                Serial_Resist.Open()
   444→            Else
   445→                Serial_Resist.PortName = PortNumber_Resist
   446→                Serial_Resist.BaudRate = 9600
   447→                Serial_Resist.DataBits = 8
   448→                Serial_Resist.Open()
   449→            End If
   450→        Catch ex As Exception
   451→            MsgBox("Serial Open REsist Fail " & PortNumber_Resist)
   452→        End Try
   453→
   454→        Try
   455→            If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen() = True Then
   456→                Serial_RFID1.Close()
   457→            End If
   458→            Serial_RFID1.PortName = PortNumber_RFID1
   459→            Serial_RFID1.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
   460→            Serial_RFID1.BaudRate = 9600
   461→            Serial_RFID1.DataBits = 8
   462→            Serial_RFID1.Open()
   463→
   464→        Catch ex As Exception

   475→            Serial_RFID2.DataBits = 8
   476→            Serial_RFID2.Open()
   477→

   487→            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
   488→            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
   489→            Serial_Scanner.Open()
   490→

    Private Sub Button4_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button4.Click
        ' 채널2 강제 리셋 (프로그램 완료 안될 때)
        If MessageBox.Show("채널2를 강제 리셋하시겠습니까?", "확인", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Warning) = DialogResult.Yes Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ2.Text = ""
            RFID_TAG_ID2 = ""
            REsist_Send = False
            wStep2 = 0
            Init_Control()

    Private Sub LoadPicture(ByVal picTarget As PictureBox, ByVal picName As String)

        Try
            picTarget.Image = System.Drawing.Image.FromFile(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Image\" & picName & ".png")
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        Try
            picTarget.Image = System.Drawing.Image.FromFile(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Image\" & picName & ".jpg")
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As FlexCell.Grid)

        Dim i As Integer
        With GridName

            'GridName.Visible = False
            .AutoRedraw = False
            .AllowUserPaste = FlexCell.ClipboardDataEnum.Text
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.Columns
            .AllowUserSort = True
            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .ExtendLastCol = True
            .SelectionMode = FlexCell.SelectionModeEnum.ByCell
            .SortIndicatorColor = Color.White
            .BoldFixedCell = False
            '.AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .Cols = 4

            .Column(0).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(1).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(2).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(3).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 60
            .Column(2).Width = 80
            .Column(3).Width = 100

            .Rows = 1
            .DefaultRowHeight = 0

            For i = 0 To .Rows - 1
                .Cell(i, 0).Text = ""
                .Cell(i, 1).Text = "No."
                .Cell(i, 2).Text = "I/O"
                .Cell(i, 3).Text = "Dec."
            Next

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub

        srcCN72.BackColor = Color.White
        srcAD2.BackColor = Color.White
        srcAE2.BackColor = Color.White
        srcPD2.BackColor = Color.White
        srcCN82.BackColor = Color.White

        srcSABTQ_SPEC.Text = ""

        ' CSAB 초기화
        srcCSABResist_DEc.Text = ""
        srcCSABResist_DEc.BackColor = Color.White

        srcCSABResist1.Text = ""
        srcCSABResist1_DEc.Text = ""
        srcCSABResist1_DEc.BackColor = Color.White

        srcCSABBArcode.Text = ""
        srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = ""
        srcCSABBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
        srcCSABBArcode_Target.Text = ""

        srcCSABTQ1.Text = ""
        srcCSABTQ2.Text = ""
        srcCSABTQ1_DEC.Text = ""
        srcCSABTQ2_DEC.Text = ""
        srcCSABTQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.White
        srcCSABTQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.White

        srcCSABTQ_DEc.Text = ""
        srcCSABTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
        srcCSABTQ_SPEC.Text = ""

        srcCSABResist_SPEC.Text = ""


    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_Resist.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Resist.Close()
                Serial_Resist.PortName = PortNumber_Resist
                Serial_Resist.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Resist.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Resist.Open()
            Else
                Serial_Resist.PortName = PortNumber_Resist
                Serial_Resist.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Resist.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Resist.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open REsist Fail " & PortNumber_Resist)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID1.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID1.PortName = PortNumber_RFID1
            Serial_RFID1.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID1.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID1.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID1.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID1 Fail " & PortNumber_RFID1)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_RFID2.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID2.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID2.PortName = PortNumber_RFID2
            Serial_RFID2.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID2.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID2.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID2.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID2 Fail " & PortNumber_RFID2)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL
