Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Net
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Threading
Imports System.Media
Imports System
Imports System.Collections.Generic
Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms
Imports System.Reflection
Imports System.IO.Ports

Public Class FrmMain

    Private RECL_FWD_NOISE As String
    Private RECL_BWD_NOISE As String
    Private LSUPT_FWD_NOISE As String
    Private LSUPT_BWD_NOISE As String
    Private PWR_END_ANGLE As String
    Private SAB_SERIAL_CACHE As String = "" ' Check_DB에서 미리 조회 → Create_End_Barcode DB 재조회 제거
    Private CN7_BArcode_Mode As Integer
    Private RF_READ_DELAY As Double
    Private RF_READ_COUNT As Double
    Private FLAG_RFID_RUN As Boolean
    Private RFID_TAG_ID As String = "" ' RFID 태그ID 최초 캡처용
    Private Tmr_Count As Double
    Private PLC_STRING As String
    Private WORK_PARTNO As String
    Private Tool_Delay_count As Double
    Private Tool_Ready As Boolean
    Private Tool_String As String
    Private Tool_Connection As Boolean
    Private tError1 As String
    Private tStep1 As String
    Private FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 As Boolean
    Private ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 As String
    Private OPTION_CARTYPE As String
    Private OPTION_LHRH As String
    Private OPTION_RECL As String
    Private OPTION_VENT As Boolean
    Private OPTION_LSUPT As String
    Private TARGET_SAB_SN As String
    Private TARGET_LSUPT_SN As String
    Private TARGET_RECL_SN As String
    Private D_OutString As String
    Private rStep As Double
    Private rCount As Double
    Private StartTime As String
    Private EndTime As String
    Private wStep As Double
    Private wCount As Double
    Public D_Value(0 To 48) As Integer
    Private IN_LABEL(20) As Label
    Private OUT_LABEL(20) As Label
    Private VALUE_IN_LABEL(20) As Label
    Private VALUE_OUT_LABEL(20) As Label
    Public PLC_VALUE(0 To 100) As Integer
    Private Trd1 As Thread
    Private Trd2 As Thread
    Private Trd3 As Thread
    Private RecvString As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
    Private Player As New SoundPlayer

    ' MX Component ActiveX - 디자이너 깨짐 방지를 위해 코드에서 동적 생성
    Friend WithEvents ACT_PLC1 As AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP

    Private Sub NG()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\NG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()

    End Sub

    Private Sub DingDOng()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\DINGDONG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button4_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button4.Click
        ' 이전공정 NG 포함 강제 바코드 출력 (wStep >= 4이면 현재 품번/시리얼로 출력)
        If wStep < 4 Then
            MsgBox("팔레트 사양이 로드된 후 사용하세요.")
            Exit Sub
        End If
        Try
            If OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" Then
                BarCode_Print_CN7(Create_End_Barcode)
            Else
                Barcode_Print_AD_PD_AE()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("바코드 출력 오류: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step1.Text = wStep1

        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep1 <> 0 Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4150", "0000000000")
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4160", "0")
            Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
            wStep1 = 0
        End If

        FLAG_RFID1_RUN = True

        If wStep1 = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then
                wStep1 = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
            RFID_TAG_ID1 = "" ' 채널1 태그ID 초기화
            wStep1 = 3

        ElseIf wStep1 = 3 Then

            If RFID_TAG_ID1.Length = 16 Then
                Try
                    Dim serial1 As String = LoadPallet(RFID_TAG_ID1)
                    If serial1 = "" Then
                        PLC_WRITE("D", "4150", "2") 'PASS
                        wStep1 = 100
                    Else
                        srcSerialNumber1.Text = serial1
                        srcColorCode_1.Text = ""
                        Load_PArt1(Mid(serial1, 13, 11))
                        ' 칼라코드 추출
                        If Len(serial1) > 23 Then
                            srcColorCode_1.Text = Mid(serial1, 24)
                        End If
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                    ' 실패 시 wStep1 유지 - 자동 재시도
                End Try
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING1 = "0000000000"
            If OPTION_RECL1 = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL1 = "EMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL1 = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL1 = "IMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If
            If OPTION_LHRH1 = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH1 = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If TARGET_SAB_SN1 = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 5, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 5, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_VENT1 = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If OPTION_LSUPT1 = "2WAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 7, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 7, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "CN7" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "AD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "AE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "3"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "PD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "4"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "CN8" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "5"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING1, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4150", PLC_STRING1)
            wStep1 = 5

        ElseIf wStep1 = 5 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(24) = 1 Then 'D4150
                wStep1 = 6
            Else
                wStep1 = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 6 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4151", "1")
            wStep1 = 7

        ElseIf wStep1 = 7 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(25) = 1 Then 'D4151
                wStep1 = 8
            Else
                wStep1 = 6
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 8 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4150", "0000000000")
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4160", "0")
                Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
                wStep1 = 0
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 100 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(24) = 2 Then
                wStep2 = 0
            Else
                wStep1 = 3
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work2_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work2.Tick

        Label_Step2.Text = wStep2

        If PLC_VALUE(12) = 0 And wStep2 <> 0 Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ2.Text = ""
            wStep2 = 0
        End If

        FLAG_RFID2_RUN = True

        If wStep2 = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(12) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(13) = 1 Then
                wStep2 = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ2.Text = ""
            RFID_TAG_ID2 = "" ' 채널2 태그ID 초기화
            wStep2 = 3

        ElseIf wStep2 = 3 Then

            If RFID_TAG_ID2.Length = 16 Then
                Try
                    Dim serial2 As String = LoadPallet(RFID_TAG_ID2)
                    If serial2 = "" Then
                        Init_Control()
                        PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", "2") 'PASS
                        wStep2 = 100
                    Else
                        Init_Control()
                        srcSerialNumber2.Text = serial2
                        Load_PArt2(Mid(serial2, 13, 11))
                        ' 칼라코드 추출 (Init_Control에서 이미 ""로 초기화됨)
                        If Len(serial2) > 23 Then
                            srcColorCode2.Text = Mid(serial2, 24)
                        End If
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                    ' 실패 시 wStep2 유지 - 자동 재시도
                End Try
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING2 = "0000000000"

            If OPTION_RECL2 = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL2 = "EMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL2 = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL2 = "IMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If

            If OPTION_LHRH2 = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH2 = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If TARGET_SAB_SN2 = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 5, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 5, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_VENT2 = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If OPTION_LSUPT2 = "2WAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 7, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 7, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "AD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "AE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "3"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "PD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "4"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "5"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING2, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", PLC_STRING2)
            wStep2 = 5

        ElseIf wStep2 = 5 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(36) = 1 Then
                wStep2 = 6
            Else
                wStep2 = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 6 Then 'SAB 시리얼 및 토크작업

            If (OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8") And TARGET_SAB_SN2 <> "0" And FUNCTION_SAB_RESIST = True Then
                If REsist_Send = False Then Request_Resist()
            End If

            If (srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcSABTQ_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcSABTQ_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcSABTQ_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcSABResist_DEc.Text = "NA") And
                (srcSabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "OK" Or srcSabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "NA") Then
                ' SAB 완료 → CSAB 작업 시작
                wStep2 = 6.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 6.1 Then 'CSAB 시리얼 및 토크작업

            If (OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8") And TARGET_CSAB_SN2 <> "0" And TARGET_CSAB_SN2 <> "" And FUNCTION_CSAB_RESIST = True Then
                If REsist_Send = False Then Request_Resist()
            End If

            If (srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcCSABTQ_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcCSABTQ_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcCSABTQ_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcCSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcCSABResist_DEc.Text = "NA") And
                (srcCsabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "OK" Or srcCsabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "NA") Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                wStep2 = 7
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 7 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4251", "1")
            wStep2 = 8

        ElseIf wStep2 = 8 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(37) = 1 Then
                wStep2 = 9
            Else
                wStep2 = 7
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 9 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(14) = 1 Then
                Try
                    Save_DB(srcSerialNumber2.Text)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    ' 실패 시 wStep2 유지 - 자동 재시도
                End Try
                wStep2 = 10
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 10 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(12) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ2.Text = ""
                wStep2 = 0
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 100 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(36) = 2 Then
                wStep2 = 0
            Else
                wStep2 = 3
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub tmr_Tool_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_Tool.Tick
        If Tool_Connection = False Then
            Tool_Connection = True
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "002099990010" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        ElseIf Tool_Connection = True Then
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3") &
            Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub Serial_Resist_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Resist.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming3 As String
        Dim tmp As String

        Incoming3 = Serial_Resist.ReadLine()
        tmp = Mid$(Incoming3, 1, Len(Incoming3) - 1)

        label_Message.Text = tmp

        If (OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8") And TARGET_SAB_SN2 <> "0" And FUNCTION_SAB_RESIST = True And wStep2 = 6 Then

            If REsist_Send = True Then

                If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+20" Or Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+30" Then
                    If srcSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
                        srcSabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "OK"
                        srcSabResistConnectorCheck.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    End If
                    label_Message.Text = "No Connection"
                Else
                    If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "-03" Then
                        label_Message.Text = Format(Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)) / 100, "0.00")
                    ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+00" Then
                        label_Message.Text = Format(Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)), "0.00")
                    End If

                    If srcSABResist1_DEc.Text <> "OK" Then
                        If (CDbl(label_Message.Text) >= (BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN)) And (CDbl(label_Message.Text) <= (BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX)) Then
                            srcSABResist1.Text = label_Message.Text
                            srcSABResist1_DEc.Text = "OK"
                            srcSABResist1_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            srcSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK"
                            srcSABResist_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                            PLC_WRITE("D", "4160", "1")
                        End If
                    End If

                End If
                REsist_Send = False
            End If

        ElseIf (OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8") And TARGET_CSAB_SN2 <> "0" And TARGET_CSAB_SN2 <> "" And FUNCTION_CSAB_RESIST = True And wStep2 = 6.1 Then

            If REsist_Send = True Then

                If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+20" Or Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+30" Then
                    If srcCSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
                        srcCsabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "OK"
                        srcCsabResistConnectorCheck.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    End If
                    label_Message.Text = "No Connection"
                Else
                    If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "-03" Then
                        label_Message.Text = Format(Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)) / 100, "0.00")
                    ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+00" Then
                        label_Message.Text = Format(Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)), "0.00")
                    End If

                    If srcCSABResist1_DEc.Text <> "OK" Then
                        If (CDbl(label_Message.Text) >= (BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN)) And (CDbl(label_Message.Text) <= (BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX)) Then
                            srcCSABResist1.Text = label_Message.Text
                            srcCSABResist1_DEc.Text = "OK"
                            srcCSABResist1_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            srcCSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK"
                            srcCSABResist_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                            PLC_WRITE("D", "4160", "1")
                        End If
                    End If

Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step.Text = wStep

        If (PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 0 And wStep <> 0) And (wStep < 4 Or wStep > 9) Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            wStep = 0
        End If

        'If (wStep > 0 And wStep <= 2) And (wStep >= 6 And wStep <= 8) Then
        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        'Else
        '    FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        'End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then
                wStep = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            RFID_TAG_ID = "" ' 새 사이클 시작 - 태그ID 클리어
            Init_Control()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            WORK_PARTNO = ""
            'Check_Now()
            wStep = 3.1

        ElseIf wStep = 3.1 Then

            If RFID_TAG_ID.Length = 16 Then
                Try
                    Dim serial As String = LoadPallet(RFID_TAG_ID)
                    If serial = "" Then
                        PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", "2") 'PASS
                        wStep = 100
                    Else
                        srcSerialNumber.Text = serial
                        Load_PArt(Mid(serial, 13, 11))
                        ' 칼라코드 추출
                        If Len(serial) > 23 Then
                            srcColorCode.Text = Mid(serial, 24)
                        End If
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING = "0100000000"

            If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If
            If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If TARGET_SAB_SN = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 5, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 5, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_VENT = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 7, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 7, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN7" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "3"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "PD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "4"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "5"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", PLC_STRING)
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(12) = 1 Then
                wStep = 6
            Else
                wStep = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            'srcSerialNumber.Text = Create_Serial()
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            Tmr_Count = 0
            wStep = 8

        ElseIf wStep = 8 Then

            wStep = 9

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then ' DB 조회
            Try
                Check_DB(srcSerialNumber.Text)
                Check_Color()
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 9.1

        ElseIf wStep = 9.1 Then ' 바코드 출력
            Try
                If srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK" Then
                    If OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" Then
                        BarCode_Print_CN7(Create_End_Barcode)
                    Else
                        Barcode_Print_AD_PD_AE()
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 10

        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(2) = 1 Then
                Try
                    Save_DB(srcSerialNumber.Text)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                wStep = 10.01
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 10.01 Then
            Try
                DeletePallet(RFID_TAG_ID)
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 10.02

        ElseIf wStep = 10.02 Then
            Try
                Save_Count()
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 10.03

        ElseIf wStep = 10.03 Then
            Try
                Init_Grid()
                Load_Grid()
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 10.1

        ElseIf wStep = 10.1 Then

            LAbel_RF_CHECK.Text = "OK"
            LAbel_RF_CHECK.BackColor = Color.White
            wStep = 11

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then


            wStep = 12

        ElseIf wStep = 12 Then

            wStep = 13

        ElseIf wStep = 13 Then

            wStep = 14

        ElseIf wStep = 14 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
                wStep = 0
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Init_Grid()

        With Grid1

            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Cols = 3
            .Rows = 1
            .FixedRows = 2
            .FrozenBottomRows = 1

            .Column(1).Locked = True
            .Column(2).Locked = True

            For i As Integer = 1 To 2

                .Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            Next

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 220
            .Column(2).Width = 170

            .Cell(0, 1).Text = "품번"
            .Cell(0, 2).Text = "생산수량"

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_Grid()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly

            Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,Count_ST15 FROM Table_Part WITH (NOLOCK)", Sql_Connect)

            Rs.MoveFirst()

            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    If SafeInt(Rs.Fields("Count_ST15").Value) <> 0 Then
                        Grid1.AddItem(SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value) & Chr(9) &
                                      SafeInt(Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST15").Value))
                    End If
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Reset_Count()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Dim tmp As Integer

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,COUNT_ST15 FROM Table_Part", Sql_Connect)

            Rs.MoveFirst()
            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST15").Value = "0"
                    Rs.Update()
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_Count()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Dim tmp As Integer

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,COUNT_ST15 FROM Table_Part Where Part_No = '" & srcPartNo.Text & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                tmp = SafeInt(Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST15").Value)

                tmp = tmp + 1

                If tmp > 20000 Then tmp = 0

                Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST15").Value = tmp

                Rs.Update()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_FormClosing(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        Connection_ForceClose()
    End Sub

    Private Shared appMutex As System.Threading.Mutex

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        ' 중복 실행 방지
        Dim createdNew As Boolean = False
        appMutex = New System.Threading.Mutex(True, "CN7_ST15_MUTEX", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            MessageBox.Show("프로그램이 이미 실행 중입니다.", "CN7 ST15", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            End
        End If

        Connection_Open()
        Connection_Open_MDB()

        InitializeActPlc()

        Init_Control()
        Control2Arry()
        Init_Grid()
        Load_Grid()
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        SerialOpen()

        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 = "192.168.0.110"
        FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False

        Tmr_Connect1.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect1.Start()

        FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        RF_READ_COUNT = 0

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()

Private Sub BarCode_Print_CN7(ByVal strSerial As String)

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")

        If CN7_BArcode_Mode = 1 Then

            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,6,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        ElseIf CN7_BArcode_Mode = 2 Then

            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,5,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        End If

        If CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) > 630 And CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) < 1530 Then 'AM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,50^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & srcColorCode.Text & " AM " & OPTION_CARTYPE & "^FS")
        Else 'PM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,50^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & srcColorCode.Text & " PM " & OPTION_CARTYPE & "^FS")
        End If
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,90^A0N,34,18^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,130^A0N,34,30^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")

        If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Or OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,170^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner FWD : " & RECL_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & RECL_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,250^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner End Angle : " & PWR_END_ANGLE & "^FS")
        End If

        If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,210^A0N,34,30^FD" & "L/SUPT FWD : " & LSUPT_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & LSUPT_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
        End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print_AD_PD_AE()

        Dim EndSerial As String = ""
        Dim SAB_SERIAL_TMP As String = "00000000000000"
        Dim SAB_TQ1_TMP As String = "00"
        Dim SAB_TQ2_TMP As String = "00"
        Dim AMPM As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TABLE_MAIN WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

                Try
                    SAB_SERIAL_TMP = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST03_SAB_SERIAL").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try

                Try
                    SAB_TQ1_TMP = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST03_SAB_TQ1").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try

                Try
                    SAB_TQ2_TMP = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST03_SAB_TQ2").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try

            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try

        '2020 02 14 0001 88888-00000

        'Mid(SAB_SERIAL_TMP, 1, 14) & _

        'tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + LOT_START + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text

        If OPTION_CARTYPE = "AD" Then

            EndSerial = "ADF" &
                                 Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 7, 5) & srcColorCode.Text & "     " &
                                 Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 3, 10) &
                                 "[)>&06" & "_1d" & "VDE4V" & "_1d" & "P" &
                                 Mid(SAB_TQ1_TMP, 1, 2) & Mid(SAB_TQ2_TMP, 1, 2)

        ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "PD" Then

            EndSerial = "PDF" &
                                             Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 7, 5) & srcColorCode.Text & "     " &
                                             Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 3, 10) &
                                             "[)>&06" & "_1d" & "VDE4V" & "_1d" & "P" &
                                             Mid(SAB_TQ1_TMP, 1, 2) & Mid(SAB_TQ2_TMP, 1, 2)

        ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AE" Then

            EndSerial = "AEF" &
                                             Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 7, 5) & srcColorCode.Text & "     " &
                                             Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 3, 10) &
                                             "[)>&06" & "_1d" & "VDE4V" & "_1d" & "P" &
                                             Mid(SAB_TQ1_TMP, 1, 2) & Mid(SAB_TQ2_TMP, 1, 2)

        End If

        srcEndSErial.Text = EndSerial

        If CInt(Format(Now, "HHmm")) >= 650 And CInt(Format(Now, "HHmm")) <= 1530 Then
            AMPM = "AM"
        Else
            AMPM = "PM"
        End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "70" & "," & "60" & "^BXN," & "8" & ",200,0,0,,^FH^FD" & EndSerial & "^FS")

        If CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) > 630 And CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) < 1530 Then 'AM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,55^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & " AM " & OPTION_CARTYPE & "^FS")
        Else 'PM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,55^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & " PM " & OPTION_CARTYPE & "^FS")
        End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,90^A0N,34,18^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,130^A0N,34,30^FD" & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 1, 8) & AMPM & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 9, 4) & "^FS")

        If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Or OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,170^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner FWD : " & RECL_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & RECL_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,250^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner End Angle : " & PWR_END_ANGLE & "^FS")
        End If

        If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,210^A0N,34,30^FD" & "L/SUPT FWD : " & LSUPT_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & LSUPT_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
        End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Function Create_End_Barcode() As String

        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"
        Dim TMP As String = ""
        Dim _4M_1 As String
        Dim _4M_2 As String = ""
        Dim _4M_3 As String
        Dim _4M_4 As String
        Dim _4M_CODE As String
        Dim i As Integer
        ' SAB 시리얼은 Check_DB()에서 미리 캐시됨 → DB 재조회 불필요 (바코드 출력 지연 방지)
        Dim SAB_SERIAL_TMP As String = SAB_SERIAL_CACHE
        Dim SplitTmp() As String
        Dim SabTmp As String = ""

        _4M_1 = "1"
        _4M_2 = LINE
        If CInt(Format(Now, "HHmm")) >= 800 And CInt(Format(Now, "HHmm")) <= 1530 Then
            _4M_3 = "A"
        Else
            _4M_3 = "B"
        End If
        _4M_4 = "1"
        _4M_CODE = _4M_1 & _4M_2 & _4M_3 & _4M_4

        If SAB_SERIAL_TMP = "" Then

            CN7_BArcode_Mode = 1

            TMP =
                "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS &
                "V" & "PB30" & GS &
                "P" & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 7, 5) & srcColorCode.Text & GS &
                "S" & "" & GS &
                "E" & "" & GS &
                "T" & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 3, 6) & _4M_CODE & "A" & "000" & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 9, 4) & GS &
                "M" & "" & GS &
                "C" & "" & GS &
                RS & EOT

        Else

            CN7_BArcode_Mode = 2

            SplitTmp = Split(SAB_SERIAL_TMP, Chr(29))

            For i = 1 To UBound(SplitTmp) - 1
                If i < UBound(SplitTmp) - 1 Then
                    SabTmp = SabTmp & SplitTmp(i) & GS
                Else
                    SabTmp = SabTmp & SplitTmp(i) & GS
                End If
            Next

            TMP =
                "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS &
                "V" & "PB30" & GS &
                "P" & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 7, 5) & srcColorCode.Text & GS &
                "S" & "" & GS &
                "E" & "" & GS &
                "T" & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 3, 6) & _4M_CODE & "A" & "000" & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 9, 4) & GS &
                "M" & "" & GS &
                "C" & "" & GS &
                RS & EOT &
                "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & SabTmp & RS & EOT

        End If

        srcEndSErial.Text = TMP

        Return TMP

688→    Private Sub Check_DB(ByVal str As String)
   689→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
   690→        Try
   691→            Connection_Open()

   693→

   701→
   702→                ' 바코드 출력에 필요한 SAB 시리얼 미리 캐시 (Create_End_Barcode DB 재조회 방지)
   703→                Try
   704→                    SAB_SERIAL_CACHE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST03_SAB_SERIAL").Value)
   705→                Catch ex As Exception

   714→
   715→                Try

   717→                Catch ex As Exception

   719→                End Try
   720→
   721→                Try
   722→                    srcST05.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST05_DECISION").Value)
   723→                Catch ex As Exception
   724→                    srcST05.Text = "NG"
   725→                End Try
   726→
   727→                Try
   728→                    srcNoiseTest.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_DECISION").Value)
   729→                Catch ex As Exception
   730→                    srcNoiseTest.Text = "NG"
   731→                End Try
   732→
   733→                Try
   734→                    srcNoiseTest.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_DECISION").Value)
   735→                Catch ex As Exception

   737→                End Try
   738→

Private Sub Check_DB(ByVal str As String)
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            EnsureIndex()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WITH (NOLOCK) where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

                ' 바코드 출력에 필요한 SAB 시리얼 미리 캐시 (Create_End_Barcode DB 재조회 방지)
                Try
                    SAB_SERIAL_CACHE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST03_SAB_SERIAL").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    SAB_SERIAL_CACHE = ""
                End Try

                Try
                    srcST01.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST01_DECISION").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    srcST01.Text = "NG"
                End Try

                Try
                    srcST03.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST03_DECISION").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    srcST03.Text = "NG"
                End Try

                Try
                    srcST05.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST05_DECISION").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    srcST05.Text = "NG"
                End Try

                Try
                    srcNoiseTest.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_DECISION").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    srcNoiseTest.Text = "NG"
                End Try

                Try
                    srcNoiseTest.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_DECISION").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    srcNoiseTest.Text = "NG"
                End Try

                Try
                    RECL_FWD_NOISE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_RECL_FWD_NOISE").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    RECL_FWD_NOISE = ""
                End Try

                Try
                    RECL_BWD_NOISE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_RECL_BWD_NOISE").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    RECL_BWD_NOISE = ""
                End Try

                Try
                    LSUPT_FWD_NOISE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_LSUPT_FWD_NOISE").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    LSUPT_FWD_NOISE = ""
                End Try

                Try
                    LSUPT_BWD_NOISE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_LSUPT_BWD_NOISE").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    LSUPT_BWD_NOISE = ""
                End Try

                Try
                    PWR_END_ANGLE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_RECL_END_ANGLE").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    PWR_END_ANGLE = ""
                End Try

            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_Color()

        If srcST01.Text = "OK" Then
            srcST01.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            srcST01.Text = "NG"
            srcST01.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If
        If srcST03.Text = "OK" Then
            srcST03.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            srcST03.Text = "NG"
            srcST03.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If
        If srcST05.Text = "OK" Then
            srcST05.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            srcST05.Text = "NG"
            srcST05.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If
        If srcNoiseTest.Text = "OK" Then
            srcNoiseTest.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            srcNoiseTest.Text = "NG"
            srcNoiseTest.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If


        If srcST01.Text <> "NG" And srcST03.Text <> "NG" And srcST05.Text <> "NG" And srcNoiseTest.Text <> "NG" Then
            srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
            srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            srcTotal_Decision.Text = "NG"
            srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(ByVal str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()
        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                    If sRecvData.Length = 28 Then
                        If Mid(sRecvData, 11, 1) = "E" Then
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = Mid(sRecvData, 11, 16)
                            ' 최초 인식 시 캡처
                            If RFID_TAG_ID = "" Then RFID_TAG_ID = Mid(sRecvData, 11, 16)
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                    Else
                        Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                    End If
                    sRecvData = ""
                    Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If
            End If
        Loop

    End Sub


    Private Sub Save_DB(ByVal snstr As String)
        Try
            Dim strSQL As String = ""

            Connection_Open()

            strSQL = "UPDATE TABLE_MAIN SET " &
                        "ST15_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                        "ST15_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
                        "ST15_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
                        "END_SERIAL = '" & srcEndSErial.Text & "'," &
                        "ST15_DECISION = '" & srcTotal_Decision.Text & "' " &
                        " WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & snstr & "'"

            Sql_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub saveDB_Second()

        'Dim strSQL As String = ""

        'Connection_Open_MDB()

        'strSQL = "INSERT INTO TABLE_MAIN_SECOND (WORK_DATE,WORK_TIME,FIRST_TQ1,FIRST_TQ2,FIRST_TQ3,FIRST_TQ4,WORK_SERIAL" &
        '                                                                        ",SECOND_TQ1,SECOND_TQ2,SECOND_TQ3,SECOND_TQ4,SECOND_TQ5,SECOND_TQ6,SECOND_TQ7,SECOND_TQ8,SLIDE_MOTOR_SERIAL) VALUES (" &
        '               "'" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "','" &
        '                       Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "','" &
        '                       tmpTQ1 & "','" &
        '                       tmpTQ2 & "','" &

        '                       tmpTQ4 & "','" &
        '                       tool2Serial.Text & "','" &
        '                       Grid2.Cell(0, 1).Text & "','" &
        '                       Grid2.Cell(1, 1).Text & "','" &
        '                       Grid2.Cell(2, 1).Text & "','" &
        '                       Grid2.Cell(3, 1).Text & "','" &
        '                       Grid2.Cell(4, 1).Text & "','" &
        '                       Grid2.Cell(5, 1).Text & "','" &
        '                       Grid2.Cell(6, 1).Text & "','" &
        '                       Grid2.Cell(7, 1).Text & "','" &
        '                       srcSlideMotorScan_Value.Text & "')"

    End Sub

  1165→    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

Private Sub Save_DB(snStr As String)

        Try
            Dim strSQL As String = ""

            Connection_Open()

            ' CSAB 컬럼 없으면 자동 생성
            EnsureCSABColumns()

            strSQL = "UPDATE TABLE_MAIN SET " &
                        "ST03_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                        "ST03_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
                        "ST03_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
                        "ST03_SAB_TQ1 = '" & srcSABTQ1.Text & "'," &
                        "ST03_SAB_TQ2 = '" & srcSABTQ2.Text & "'," &
                        "ST03_SAB_SERIAL = '" & srcSABBArcode.Text & "'," &
                        "ST03_SAB_RESIST = '" & srcSABResist1.Text & "'," &
                        "ST03_CSAB_TQ1 = '" & srcCSABTQ1.Text & "'," &
                        "ST03_CSAB_TQ2 = '" & srcCSABTQ2.Text & "'," &
                        "ST03_CSAB_SERIAL = '" & srcCSABBArcode.Text & "'," &
                        "ST03_CSAB_RESIST = '" & srcCSABResist1.Text & "'," &
                        "ST03_DECISION = '" & "OK" & "' " &
                        "WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & snStr & "'"

            Sql_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' CSAB 컬럼이 TABLE_MAIN에 없으면 ALTER TABLE로 자동 생성
    ''' </summary>
    Private Shared csabColumnsEnsured As Boolean = False
    Private Sub EnsureCSABColumns()
        If csabColumnsEnsured Then Exit Sub
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Dim cols() As String = {"ST03_CSAB_TQ1 nchar(10)", "ST03_CSAB_TQ2 nchar(10)", "ST03_CSAB_SERIAL nchar(100)", "ST03_CSAB_RESIST nchar(10)"}
            For Each col As String In cols
                Try
                    Sql_Connect.Execute("ALTER TABLE TABLE_MAIN ADD " & col)
                Catch : End Try ' 이미 존재하면 무시
            Next
            csabColumnsEnsured = True
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function Create_Serial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Try
            Connection_Open_MDB()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE WORK_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Mdb_Connect)

            tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo2.Text
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing AndAlso Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex2 As Exception
            End Try
        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function

        FrmPart.Show()

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing

    Private Sub Request_Resist()

        If Serial_Resist.IsOpen = True Then
            Serial_Resist.Write(":MEAS:RES?" & ControlChars.CrLf)
            REsist_Send = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_CONNECT()

        'ACT_PLC1.ActNetworkNumber = 1
        'ACT_PLC1.ActStationNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActCpuType = 146

        ACT_PLC1.ActHostAddress = ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1
        If ACT_PLC1.Open <> 0 Then
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
        Else
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        If wStep2 = 6 Then

            If InStr(1, ScanData, srcSABBArcode_Target.Text) <> 0 Then
                srcSABBArcode.Text = ScanData
                srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                srcSABBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                DingDOng()
            Else
                srcSABBArcode.Text = ScanData
                srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "NG"
                srcSABBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                NG()
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 6.1 Then

            ' 이미 OK/PASS/NA 완료 상태이면 스캔 무시 (PASS/NA를 NG로 덮어쓰는 버그 방지)
            If srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text <> "OK" And srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text <> "PASS" And srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text <> "NA" Then
                If InStr(1, ScanData, srcCSABBArcode_Target.Text) <> 0 Then
                    srcCSABBArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcCSABBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                Else
                    srcCSABBArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "NG"
                    srcCSABBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                End If
            End If

        Else

            'label_Message.Text = "Reset Need"

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_PArt1(ByVal str As String)

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then


                srcPartNo1.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value)
                srcPartName1.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)

                OPTION_CARTYPE1 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CAR").Value)
                OPTION_LHRH1 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LHRH").Value)
                OPTION_RECL1 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_RECL").Value)
                OPTION_VENT1 = SafeBool(Rs.Fields("OPTION_VENT").Value)
                OPTION_LSUPT1 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LSUPT").Value)

                TARGET_RECL_SN1 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("RECL_SN").Value)
                TARGET_SAB_SN1 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("SAB_SN").Value)
                TARGET_LSUPT_SN1 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("LSUPT_SN").Value)

                If OPTION_LSUPT1 = "2WAY" Then
                    srcLSUPT1.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcLSUPT1.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "CN7" Then
                    srcCN7_1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcAD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8_1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "AD" Then
                    srcCN7_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD_1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcAE_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8_1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "AE" Then
                    srcCN7_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE_1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcPD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8_1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "PD" Then
                    srcCN7_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD_1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcCN8_1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "CN8" Then
                    srcCN7_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8_1.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If

                If OPTION_LHRH1 = "LH" Then
                    srcLH1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcRH1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_LHRH1 = "RH" Then
                    srcRH1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcLH1.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_RECL1 = "MNL" Then
                    srcMNL1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMC1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL1 = "EMC" Then
                    srcMNL1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcIMS1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL1 = "IMS" Then
                    srcMNL1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMS1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL1 = "EMS" Then
                    srcMNL1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS1.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If

                If TARGET_SAB_SN1 <> "0" Then
                    srcSAB1.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcSAB1.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_VENT1 = True Then
                    srcVENT1.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcVENT1.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                wStep1 = 4

            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing AndAlso Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex2 As Exception
            End Try
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_PArt2(ByVal str As String)

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

                StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

                srcPartNo2.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value)
                srcPartName2.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)

                LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)

                OPTION_CARTYPE2 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CAR").Value)
                OPTION_LHRH2 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LHRH").Value)
                OPTION_RECL2 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_RECL").Value)
                OPTION_VENT2 = SafeBool(Rs.Fields("OPTION_VENT").Value)
                OPTION_LSUPT2 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LSUPT").Value)

                TARGET_RECL_SN2 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("RECL_SN").Value)
                TARGET_SAB_SN2 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("SAB_SN").Value)
                TARGET_CSAB_SN2 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("CSAB_SN").Value)
                TARGET_LSUPT_SN2 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("LSUPT_SN").Value)

                srcSABBArcode_Target.Text = TARGET_SAB_SN2

                srcSABTQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_SAB_TQ_UNIT
                srcSABResist_SPEC.Text = BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX & " " & "Ω"
                If TARGET_SAB_SN2 <> "0" Then

                    If FUNCTION_SAB_SERIAL = True Then

                        srcSABBArcode.Text = ""
                        srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = ""
                        srcSABBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.White

                    Else

                        srcSABBArcode.Text = "PASS"
                        srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                        srcSABBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                        srcSABBArcode_Target.Text = "PASS"

                    End If

                    If FUNCTION_SAB_TQ = True Then

                        srcSABTQ_DEc.Text = ""
                        srcSABTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                        srcSABTQ1.Text = ""
                        srcSABTQ2.Text = ""

                    Else

                        srcSABTQ_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                        srcSABTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                        srcSABTQ1.Text = "PASS"
                        srcSABTQ2.Text = "PASS"

                    End If

                Else

                    srcSABBArcode.Text = "NA"
                    srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcSABBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    srcSABBArcode_Target.Text = "NA"

                    srcSABTQ_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcSABTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcSABTQ1.Text = "NA"
                    srcSABTQ2.Text = "NA"

                End If

                If (OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8") And TARGET_SAB_SN2 <> "0" And FUNCTION_SAB_RESIST = True Then
                    srcSABResist_DEc.Text = ""
                    srcSABResist_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcSABResist1.Text = ""
                    srcSABResist1_DEc.Text = ""
                    srcSABResist1_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcSabResistConnectorCheck.Text = ""
                    srcSabResistConnectorCheck.BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    srcSABResist_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcSABResist_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcSABResist1.Text = "NA"
                    srcSABResist1_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcSABResist1_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcSabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "NA"
                    srcSabResistConnectorCheck.BackColor = Color.Green
                End If

                ' CSAB 초기화
                If TARGET_CSAB_SN2 <> "0" And TARGET_CSAB_SN2 <> "" Then
                    srcCSABBArcode_Target.Text = TARGET_CSAB_SN2
                    srcCSABTQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_SAB_TQ_UNIT
                    srcCSABResist_SPEC.Text = BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX & " " & "Ω"
                    If FUNCTION_CSAB_SERIAL = True Then
                        srcCSABBArcode.Text = ""
                        srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = ""
                        srcCSABBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                    Else
                        srcCSABBArcode.Text = "PASS"
                        srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                        srcCSABBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                        srcCSABBArcode_Target.Text = "PASS"
                    End If
                    If FUNCTION_CSAB_TQ = True Then
                        srcCSABTQ_DEc.Text = ""
                        srcCSABTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                        srcCSABTQ1.Text = ""
                        srcCSABTQ2.Text = ""
                    Else
                        srcCSABTQ_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                        srcCSABTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                        srcCSABTQ1.Text = "PASS"

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function


    Sub DO_ON(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 34 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "1"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.Black
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_OFF(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 34 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "0"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.White
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_WRITE()

        If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen = True Then Serial_RFID1.Write(D_OutString)

    End Sub

전체 코드 분석 완료. 3가지 이슈에 대한 분석 결과입니다.

---

## 이슈 1: ST01 데이터 저장 누락

**원인 분석**: `Tmr_Work1_Tick` 상단에 PLC 안전 리셋 로직이 있음

```vb
' ST01/FrmMain.vb:1136
If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
    wStep = 0  ← 저장 도중에도 강제 리셋!
End If
```

wStep이 13~14 (SavePallet/Save_DB 단계)인 상태에서 PLC D4000이 0이 되면 저장을 건너뛰고 wStep=0으로 리셋됨. 또한 Save_DB/SavePallet 내부 Try/Catch가 예외를 삼켜서 실패해도 다음 스텝으로 진행됨.

**해결 방안**: 저장 스텝(wStep >= 13) 진행 중에는 PLC 리셋을 무시하도록 조건 추가

```vb
' 변경 전
If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then

' 변경 후 - 저장 단계(13~15)에서는 리셋 금지
If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 And wStep < 13 Then
```

---

## 이슈 2: ST03(?) 듀얼 채널 충돌로 프로그램 뻗음

> ST02는 프로젝트에 없는데, 듀얼 채널(앞/뒤)이 있는 건 **ST03**과 **ST05**입니다. 어느 공정인지 확인 부탁드립니다.

**원인 분석** (ST03 기준):

1. **ADODB COM 리엔트런시**: 두 타이머(Tmr_Work1/Tmr_Work2)가 UI 스레드에서 돌지만, ADODB는 COM 호출 중 메시지 펌프가 동작하여 다른 타이머 Tick이 재진입 가능. 채널1 LoadPallet 중 채널2 Save_DB가 동시에 같은 `Sql_Connect`를 접근하면 충돌.

2. **wStep2 강제 리셋 버그** (ST03/FrmMain.vb:1833):
```vb
ElseIf wStep1 = 100 Then
    If PLC_VALUE(24) = 2 Then
        wStep2 = 0  ← 채널1이 채널2를 강제 리셋!
    End If
```
채널2가 작업 중(wStep2=6)인데 채널1이 wStep2=0으로 밀어버리면 상태 꼬임.

3. **시리얼 이벤트 크로스스레드**: Serial_Scanner_DataReceived, Serial_Resist_DataReceived가 백그라운드 스레드에서 UI 컨트롤 직접 접근.

**해결 방안**:
- 타이머 Tick에 재진입 방지 플래그 추가
- wStep1=100에서 wStep2 강제 리셋 로직 제거 또는 조건 추가
- DB 호출 시 타이머 일시 정지 (`Tmr_Work1.Stop / Start`)

---

## 이슈 3: ST15 바코드 프린터 지연

**원인 분석**:

wStep=9.1에서 바코드 출력하는데, `Barcode_Print_AD_PD_AE()` (AD/PD/AE 차종)는 **Check_DB 캐시를 사용하지 않고 DB를 다시 조회**함:

```vb
' ST15/FrmMain.vb:375 - AD/PD/AE 바코드 출력에서 DB 재조회
Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TABLE_MAIN WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "'", Sql_Connect)
```

CN7/CN8은 `SAB_SERIAL_CACHE`를 사용하도록 이미 개선했지만, AD/PD/AE는 여전히 풀 DB 쿼리 실행. SAB_TQ1/TQ2도 별도 조회 중.

**해결 방안**: Check_DB에서 SAB_TQ1/TQ2도 캐시하고, Barcode_Print_AD_PD_AE에서 캐시 사용

---

Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step1.Text = wStep1

        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep1 <> 0 Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4350", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
            wStep1 = 0
        End If

        FLAG_RFID1_RUN = True

        If wStep1 = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then
                wStep1 = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
            RFID_TAG_ID1 = "" ' RFID 태그ID 초기화 (채널1)
            wStep1 = 3

        ElseIf wStep1 = 3 Then

            If RFID_TAG_ID1.Length = 16 Then
                Try
                    Dim serial1 As String = LoadPallet(RFID_TAG_ID1)
                    If serial1 = "" Then
                        PLC_WRITE("D", "4350", "2") 'PASS
                        wStep1 = 100
                    Else
                        srcSerialNumber1.Text = serial1
                        srcColorCode_1.Text = ""
                        Load_PArt1(Mid(serial1, 13, 11))
                        ' 칼라코드 추출
                        If Len(serial1) > 23 Then
                            srcColorCode_1.Text = Mid(serial1, 24)
                        End If
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING1 = "0000000000"

            If OPTION_RECL1 = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL1 = "EMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL1 = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL1 = "IMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If
            If OPTION_LHRH1 = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH1 = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If TARGET_SAB_SN1 = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 5, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 5, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_VENT1 = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If OPTION_LSUPT1 = "2WAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 7, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 7, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "CN7" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "AD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "AE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "3"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "PD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "4"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "CN8" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "5"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING1, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4350", PLC_STRING1)
            wStep1 = 5

        ElseIf wStep1 = 5 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(24) = 1 Then 'D4150
                wStep1 = 6
            Else
                wStep1 = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 6 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4351", "1")
            wStep1 = 7

        ElseIf wStep1 = 7 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(25) = 1 Then 'D4151
                wStep1 = 8
            Else
                wStep1 = 6
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 8 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4350", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
                wStep1 = 0
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 100 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(24) = 2 Then 'D4150
                wStep1 = 0
            Else
                wStep1 = 3
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work2_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work2.Tick

        Label_Step2.Text = wStep2

        If PLC_VALUE(12) = 0 And wStep2 <> 0 Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4450", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ2.Text = ""
            wStep2 = 0
        End If

        FLAG_RFID2_RUN = True

        If wStep2 = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(12) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(13) = 1 Then
                wStep2 = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ2.Text = ""
            RFID_TAG_ID2 = "" ' RFID 태그ID 초기화 (채널2)
            wStep2 = 3

        ElseIf wStep2 = 3 Then

            If RFID_TAG_ID2.Length = 16 Then
                Try
                    Dim serial2 As String = LoadPallet(RFID_TAG_ID2)
                    Init_Control()
                    If serial2 = "" Then
                        PLC_WRITE("D", "4450", "2") 'PASS
                        wStep2 = 100
                    Else
                        srcSerialNumber2.Text = serial2
                        Load_PArt2(Mid(serial2, 13, 11))
                        ' 칼라코드 추출
                        If Len(serial2) > 23 Then
                            srcColorCode2.Text = Mid(serial2, 24)
                        End If
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING2 = "0000000000"

            If OPTION_RECL2 = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL2 = "EMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL2 = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL2 = "IMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If
            If OPTION_LHRH2 = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH2 = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If TARGET_SAB_SN2 = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 5, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 5, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_VENT2 = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If OPTION_LSUPT2 = "2WAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 7, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 7, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "AD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "AE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "3"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "PD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "4"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "5"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING2, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4450", PLC_STRING2)
            wStep2 = 5

        ElseIf wStep2 = 5 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(36) = 1 Then
                wStep2 = 6
            Else
                wStep2 = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 6 Then 'LSUPT 시리얼 스캔

            If (srcLSUPTBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcLSUPTBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcLSUPTBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcHArNESSBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcHArNESSBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcHArNESSBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Try
                    Save_DB(srcSerialNumber2.Text)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                wStep2 = 7
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 7 Then

                PLC_WRITE("D", "4451", "1")
                wStep2 = 8

            ElseIf wStep2 = 8 Then

                If PLC_VALUE(37) = 1 Then
                    wStep2 = 9
                Else
                    wStep2 = 7
                End If

            ElseIf wStep2 = 9 Then

                If PLC_VALUE(14) = 1 Then
                    Try
                        Save_DB(srcSerialNumber2.Text)
                    Catch ex As Exception
                    End Try
                    wStep2 = 10
                End If

            ElseIf wStep2 = 10 Then

content.thinking:
Good. ST05 has a different structure at wStep1=100:
```vb
ElseIf wStep1 = 100 Then
    If PLC_VALUE(24) = 2 Then 'D4150
        wStep1 = 0   ← ST05는 wStep1=0만 리셋, wStep2를 건드리지 않음!
    Else
        wStep1 = 3
    End If
```

So ST05 doesn't have the `wStep2 = 0` forced reset issue that ST03 has. 

But ST05 still has the ADODB COM reentrancy problem, and I'm noticing it calls Save_DB twice—once at wStep2=6 and again at wStep2=9—which is unusual. Now I need to map out the fixes: ST01 needs a PLC reset protection condition added at line 1136, while ST03 and ST05 both need the dual channel ADODB issue addressed.

For ST03, I'm adding reentrancy guard flags to both timer ticks and fixing the problematic wStep2 reset logic at line 1833. ST05 has the same reentrancy guard issue but doesn't have that forced reset, so it's simpler. Then for ST15, I need to cache the SAB_TQ1 and SAB_TQ2 values...

Adding reentrancy protection and cache variables...

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_RFID
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_RFID)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL
            Serial_Tool.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool.Open()
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            tmr_Tool.Interval = 5000
            tmr_Tool.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL)
        End Try


    End Sub
