    Private Sub Tmr_Connect1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect1.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If

        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.5
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            If FLAG_RFID1_RUN = True Then Read_RFiD1()
            If FLAG_RFID2_RUN = True Then Read_RFiD2()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If


    End Sub

    Private Sub Read_RFiD1()
        If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen = True Then
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID1.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub Read_RFiD2()
        If Serial_RFID2.IsOpen = True Then
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID2.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub PLC_READ()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 48

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "D4100" & vbLf &
                                "D4101" & vbLf &
                                "D4102" & vbLf &
                                "D4103" & vbLf &
                                "D4104" & vbLf &
                                "D4105" & vbLf &
                                "D4106" & vbLf &
                                "D4107" & vbLf &
                                "D4108" & vbLf &
                                "D4109" & vbLf &
                                "D4110" & vbLf &
                                "D4111" & vbLf &
                                "D4200" & vbLf &
                                "D4201" & vbLf &
                                "D4202" & vbLf &
                                "D4203" & vbLf &
                                "D4204" & vbLf &
                                "D4205" & vbLf &
                                "D4206" & vbLf &
                                "D4207" & vbLf &
                                "D4208" & vbLf &
                                "D4209" & vbLf &
                                "D4210" & vbLf &
                                "D4211" & vbLf &
                                "D4150" & vbLf &
                                "D4151" & vbLf &
                                "D4152" & vbLf &
                                "D4153" & vbLf &
                                "D4154" & vbLf &
                                "D4155" & vbLf &
                                "D4156" & vbLf &
                                "D4157" & vbLf &
                                "D4158" & vbLf &
                                "D4159" & vbLf &
                                "D4160" & vbLf &
                                "D4161" & vbLf &
                                "D4250" & vbLf &
                                "D4251" & vbLf &
                                "D4252" & vbLf &
                                "D4253" & vbLf &
                                "D4254" & vbLf &
                                "D4255" & vbLf &
                                "D4256" & vbLf &
                                "D4257" & vbLf &
                                "D4258" & vbLf &
                                "D4259" & vbLf &
                                "D4260" & vbLf &
                                "D4261"
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For j = 0 To 23
                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 23
                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 24)
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next

            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        ' 재진입 방지 (ADODB COM 호출 중 메시지 펌프로 다른 Tick 진입 차단)
        If tmr1Busy Then Exit Sub
        tmr1Busy = True

        Try

        Label_Step1.Text = wStep1

        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep1 <> 0 Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4150", "0000000000")
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4160", "0")
            Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
            wStep1 = 0
        End If

        FLAG_RFID1_RUN = True

        If wStep1 = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then
                wStep1 = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
            RFID_TAG_ID1 = "" ' 채널1 태그ID 초기화
            wStep1 = 3

        ElseIf wStep1 = 3 Then

            If RFID_TAG_ID1.Length = 16 Then
                Try
                    Dim serial1 As String = LoadPallet(RFID_TAG_ID1)
                    If serial1 = "" Then
                        PLC_WRITE("D", "4150", "2") 'PASS
                        wStep1 = 100
                    Else
                        srcSerialNumber1.Text = serial1
                        srcColorCode_1.Text = ""
                        Load_PArt1(Mid(serial1, 13, 11))
                        ' 칼라코드 추출
                        If Len(serial1) > 23 Then
                            srcColorCode_1.Text = Mid(serial1, 24)
                        End If
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                    ' 실패 시 wStep1 유지 - 자동 재시도
                End Try
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING1 = "0000000000"
            If OPTION_RECL1 = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL1 = "EMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL1 = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL1 = "IMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If
            If OPTION_LHRH1 = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH1 = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If TARGET_SAB_SN1 = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 5, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 5, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_VENT1 = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If OPTION_LSUPT1 = "2WAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 7, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 7, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "CN7" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "AD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "AE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "3"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "PD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "4"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "CN8" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "5"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING1, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4150", PLC_STRING1)
            wStep1 = 5

        ElseIf wStep1 = 5 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(24) = 1 Then 'D4150
                wStep1 = 6
            Else
                wStep1 = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 6 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4151", "1")
            wStep1 = 7

        ElseIf wStep1 = 7 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(25) = 1 Then 'D4151
                wStep1 = 8
            Else
                wStep1 = 6
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 8 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4150", "0000000000")
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4160", "0")
                Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
                wStep1 = 0
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 100 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(24) = 2 Then
                ' 채널2가 작업 중이면 강제 리셋하지 않음 (충돌 방지)
                If wStep2 = 0 Then wStep1 = 0
            Else
                wStep1 = 3
            End If

        End If

        Finally
            tmr1Busy = False
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work2_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work2.Tick

        Label_Step2.Text = wStep2

        If PLC_VALUE(12) = 0 And wStep2 <> 0 Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ2.Text = ""
            wStep2 = 0
        End If

        FLAG_RFID2_RUN = True

        If wStep2 = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(12) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(13) = 1 Then
                wStep2 = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ2.Text = ""
            RFID_TAG_ID2 = "" ' 채널2 태그ID 초기화
            wStep2 = 3

        ElseIf wStep2 = 3 Then

            If RFID_TAG_ID2.Length = 16 Then
                Try
                    Dim serial2 As String = LoadPallet(RFID_TAG_ID2)
                    If serial2 = "" Then
                        Init_Control()
                        PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", "2") 'PASS
                        wStep2 = 100
                    Else
                        Init_Control()
                        srcSerialNumber2.Text = serial2
                        Load_PArt2(Mid(serial2, 13, 11))
                        ' 칼라코드 추출 (Init_Control에서 이미 ""로 초기화됨)
                        If Len(serial2) > 23 Then
                            srcColorCode2.Text = Mid(serial2, 24)
                        End If
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                    ' 실패 시 wStep2 유지 - 자동 재시도
                End Try
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING2 = "0000000000"

            If OPTION_RECL2 = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL2 = "EMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL2 = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL2 = "IMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If

            If OPTION_LHRH2 = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH2 = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If TARGET_SAB_SN2 = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 5, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 5, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_VENT2 = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If OPTION_LSUPT2 = "2WAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 7, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 7, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "AD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "AE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "3"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "PD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "4"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "5"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING2, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", PLC_STRING2)
            wStep2 = 5

        ElseIf wStep2 = 5 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(36) = 1 Then
                wStep2 = 6
            Else
                wStep2 = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 6 Then 'SAB 시리얼 및 토크작업

            If (OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8") And TARGET_SAB_SN2 <> "0" And FUNCTION_SAB_RESIST = True Then
                If REsist_Send = False Then Request_Resist()
            End If

            If (srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcSABTQ_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcSABTQ_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcSABTQ_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcSABResist_DEc.Text = "NA") And
                (srcSabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "OK" Or srcSabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "NA") Then
                ' SAB 완료 → CSAB 작업 시작
                wStep2 = 6.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 6.1 Then 'CSAB 시리얼 및 토크작업

            If (OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8") And TARGET_CSAB_SN2 <> "0" And TARGET_CSAB_SN2 <> "" And FUNCTION_CSAB_RESIST = True Then
                If REsist_Send = False Then Request_Resist()
            End If

            If (srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcCSABTQ_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcCSABTQ_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcCSABTQ_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcCSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcCSABResist_DEc.Text = "NA") And
                (srcCsabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "OK" Or srcCsabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "NA") Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                wStep2 = 7
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 7 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4251", "1")
            wStep2 = 8

        ElseIf wStep2 = 8 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(37) = 1 Then
                wStep2 = 9
            Else
                wStep2 = 7
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 9 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(14) = 1 Then
                Try
                    Save_DB(srcSerialNumber2.Text)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    ' 실패 시 wStep2 유지 - 자동 재시도
                End Try
                wStep2 = 10
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 10 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(12) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ2.Text = ""
                wStep2 = 0
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 100 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(36) = 2 Then
                wStep2 = 0
            Else
                wStep2 = 3
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub tmr_Tool_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_Tool.Tick
        If Tool_Connection = False Then
            Tool_Connection = True
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "002099990010" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        ElseIf Tool_Connection = True Then
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3") &
            Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub Serial_Resist_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Resist.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming3 As String
        Dim tmp As String

        Incoming3 = Serial_Resist.ReadLine()
        tmp = Mid$(Incoming3, 1, Len(Incoming3) - 1)

        label_Message.Text = tmp

        If (OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8") And TARGET_SAB_SN2 <> "0" And FUNCTION_SAB_RESIST = True And wStep2 = 6 Then

            If REsist_Send = True Then

                If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+20" Or Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+30" Then
                    If srcSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
                        srcSabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "OK"
                        srcSabResistConnectorCheck.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    End If
                    label_Message.Text = "No Connection"
                Else
                    If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "-03" Then
                        label_Message.Text = Format(Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)) / 100, "0.00")
                    ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+00" Then
                        label_Message.Text = Format(Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)), "0.00")
                    End If

                    If srcSABResist1_DEc.Text <> "OK" Then
                        If (CDbl(label_Message.Text) >= (BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN)) And (CDbl(label_Message.Text) <= (BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX)) Then
                            srcSABResist1.Text = label_Message.Text
                            srcSABResist1_DEc.Text = "OK"
                            srcSABResist1_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            srcSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK"
                            srcSABResist_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                            PLC_WRITE("D", "4160", "1")
                        End If
                    End If

                End If
                REsist_Send = False
            End If

        ElseIf (OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8") And TARGET_CSAB_SN2 <> "0" And TARGET_CSAB_SN2 <> "" And FUNCTION_CSAB_RESIST = True And wStep2 = 6.1 Then

            If REsist_Send = True Then

                If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+20" Or Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+30" Then
                    If srcCSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
                        srcCsabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "OK"
                        srcCsabResistConnectorCheck.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    End If
                    label_Message.Text = "No Connection"
                Else
                    If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "-03" Then
                        label_Message.Text = Format(Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)) / 100, "0.00")
                    ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+00" Then
                        label_Message.Text = Format(Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)), "0.00")
                    End If

                    If srcCSABResist1_DEc.Text <> "OK" Then
                        If (CDbl(label_Message.Text) >= (BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN)) And (CDbl(label_Message.Text) <= (BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX)) Then
                            srcCSABResist1.Text = label_Message.Text
                            srcCSABResist1_DEc.Text = "OK"
                            srcCSABResist1_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            srcCSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK"
                            srcCSABResist_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                            PLC_WRITE("D", "4160", "1")
                        End If
                    End If

                End If
                REsist_Send = False
            End If

        End If


    End Sub

    ' MX Component ActiveX 동적 생성 (디자이너 깨짐 방지)
    Private Sub InitializeActPlc()
        Try
            ACT_PLC1 = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
            CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
            ACT_PLC1.Enabled = True
            ACT_PLC1.Location = New System.Drawing.Point(1735, 35)
            ACT_PLC1.Name = "ACT_PLC1"
            ACT_PLC1.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(32, 32)
            ACT_PLC1.Visible = False
            Me.Panel6.Controls.Add(ACT_PLC1)
            CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("ACT_PLC1 초기화 실패: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' 팔레트 조회
    Private Function LoadPallet(ByVal strPalletID As String) As String
        Dim serial As String = ""
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                serial = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing AndAlso Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex2 As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
        Return serial
    End Function

End Class

    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As FlexCell.Grid)

        Dim i As Integer

            .Column(2).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(3).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 60
            .Column(2).Width = 80
            .Column(3).Width = 100

            .Rows = 1

            For i = 0 To .Rows - 1

                .Cell(i, 2).Text = "I/O"
                .Cell(i, 3).Text = "Dec."
            Next

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_Resist.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Resist.Close()
                Serial_Resist.PortName = PortNumber_Resist
                Serial_Resist.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Resist.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Resist.Open()
            Else
                Serial_Resist.PortName = PortNumber_Resist
                Serial_Resist.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Resist.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Resist.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open REsist Fail " & PortNumber_Resist)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID1.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID1.PortName = PortNumber_RFID1
            Serial_RFID1.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID1.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID1.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID1.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID1 Fail " & PortNumber_RFID1)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_RFID2.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID2.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID2.PortName = PortNumber_RFID2
            Serial_RFID2.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID2.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID2.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID2.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID2 Fail " & PortNumber_RFID2)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL
            Serial_Tool.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool.Open()
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            tmr_Tool.Interval = 5000
            tmr_Tool.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL)
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Request_Resist()

        If Serial_Resist.IsOpen = True Then
            Serial_Resist.Write(":MEAS:RES?" & ControlChars.CrLf)
            REsist_Send = True
        End If

    End Sub

        'ACT_PLC1.ActNetworkNumber = 1
        'ACT_PLC1.ActStationNumber = 1

    End Sub

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        If wStep2 = 6 Then

            If InStr(1, ScanData, srcSABBArcode_Target.Text) <> 0 Then
                srcSABBArcode.Text = ScanData
                srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                srcSABBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                DingDOng()
            Else
                srcSABBArcode.Text = ScanData
                srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "NG"
                srcSABBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                NG()
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 6.1 Then

            ' 이미 OK/PASS/NA 완료 상태이면 스캔 무시 (PASS/NA를 NG로 덮어쓰는 버그 방지)
            If srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text <> "OK" And srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text <> "PASS" And srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text <> "NA" Then
                If InStr(1, ScanData, srcCSABBArcode_Target.Text) <> 0 Then
                    srcCSABBArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcCSABBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                Else
                    srcCSABBArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "NG"
                    srcCSABBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                End If
            End If

        Else

            'label_Message.Text = "Reset Need"

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_PArt1(ByVal str As String)

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then


                srcPartNo1.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value)
                srcPartName1.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)

                OPTION_CARTYPE1 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CAR").Value)
                OPTION_LHRH1 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LHRH").Value)
                OPTION_RECL1 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_RECL").Value)
                OPTION_VENT1 = SafeBool(Rs.Fields("OPTION_VENT").Value)
                OPTION_LSUPT1 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LSUPT").Value)

                TARGET_RECL_SN1 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("RECL_SN").Value)
                TARGET_SAB_SN1 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("SAB_SN").Value)
                TARGET_LSUPT_SN1 = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("LSUPT_SN").Value)

                If OPTION_LSUPT1 = "2WAY" Then
                    srcLSUPT1.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcLSUPT1.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "CN7" Then
                    srcCN7_1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcAD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8_1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "AD" Then
                    srcCN7_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD_1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcAE_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8_1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "AE" Then
                    srcCN7_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE_1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcPD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8_1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "PD" Then
                    srcCN7_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD_1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcCN8_1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "CN8" Then
                    srcCN7_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD_1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8_1.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If

                If OPTION_LHRH1 = "LH" Then
                    srcLH1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcRH1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_LHRH1 = "RH" Then
                    srcRH1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcLH1.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_RECL1 = "MNL" Then
                    srcMNL1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMC1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL1 = "EMC" Then
                    srcMNL1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcIMS1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL1 = "IMS" Then
                    srcMNL1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS1.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMS1.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL1 = "EMS" Then
                    srcMNL1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS1.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS1.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If

                If TARGET_SAB_SN1 <> "0" Then
                    srcSAB1.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcSAB1.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_VENT1 = True Then
                    srcVENT1.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcVENT1.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                wStep1 = 4

            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing AndAlso Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex2 As Exception
            End Try
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_PArt2(ByVal str As String)

                    srcCN72.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE2.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcPD2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN82.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "PD" Then
                    srcCN72.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD2.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcCN82.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8" Then
                    srcCN72.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN82.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If

                If OPTION_LHRH2 = "LH" Then
                    srcLH2.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcRH2.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_LHRH2 = "RH" Then
                    srcRH2.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcLH2.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_RECL2 = "MNL" Then
                    srcMNL2.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMC2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS2.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL2 = "EMC" Then
                    srcMNL2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC2.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcIMS2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS2.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL2 = "IMS" Then
                    srcMNL2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS2.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMS2.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL2 = "EMS" Then
                    srcMNL2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS2.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS2.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If

                If TARGET_SAB_SN2 <> "0" Then
                    srcSAB2.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcSAB2.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_VENT2 = True Then
                    srcVENT2.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcVENT2.BackColor = Color.White
                End If
                wStep2 = 4

            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing AndAlso Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex2 As Exception
            End Try
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function


    Sub DO_ON(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 34 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "1"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.Black
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_OFF(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 34 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "0"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.White
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_WRITE()

        If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen = True Then Serial_RFID1.Write(D_OutString)

    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' CSAB 컬럼이 TABLE_MAIN에 없으면 ALTER TABLE로 자동 생성
    ''' </summary>
    Private Shared csabColumnsEnsured As Boolean = False
    Private Sub EnsureCSABColumns()
        If csabColumnsEnsured Then Exit Sub
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Dim cols() As String = {"ST03_CSAB_TQ1 nchar(10)", "ST03_CSAB_TQ2 nchar(10)", "ST03_CSAB_SERIAL nchar(100)", "ST03_CSAB_RESIST nchar(10)"}
            For Each col As String In cols
                Try
                    Sql_Connect.Execute("ALTER TABLE TABLE_MAIN ADD " & col)
                Catch : End Try ' 이미 존재하면 무시
            Next
            csabColumnsEnsured = True
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function Create_Serial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Try
            Connection_Open_MDB()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE WORK_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Mdb_Connect)

            tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo2.Text
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing AndAlso Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex2 As Exception
            End Try
        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Shared appMutex As System.Threading.Mutex

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        ' 중복 실행 방지
        Dim createdNew As Boolean = False
        appMutex = New System.Threading.Mutex(True, "CN7_ST03_MUTEX", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            MessageBox.Show("프로그램이 이미 실행 중입니다.", "CN7 ST03", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            End
        End If

        Connection_Open()
        Connection_Open_MDB()
        EnsureMdbColumns()

        InitializeActPlc()
        Init_Control()
        Control2Arry()
        Init_Grid(Grid1)
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        SerialOpen()

        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 = "192.168.0.110"
        FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False

        Tmr_Connect1.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect1.Start()

        Read_RFiD1()
        Read_RFiD2()

        If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
        End If

        If Serial_RFID2.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask3)
            Trd3.IsBackground = True
            Trd3.Start()
        End If

        If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
        End If

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        Tmr_Work2.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work2.Start()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID1.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                    If sRecvData.Length = 28 Then
                        If Mid(sRecvData, 11, 1) = "E" Then
                            Label_RF_READ1.Text = Mid(sRecvData, 11, 16)
                            ' 채널1 RFID 태그ID 최초 캡처
                            If RFID_TAG_ID1 = "" Then RFID_TAG_ID1 = Mid(sRecvData, 11, 16)
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ1.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                    Else
                        Label_RF_READ1.Text = "Empty"
                    End If
                    sRecvData = ""
                    Serial_RFID1.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If
            End If
        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask3()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID2.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                    If sRecvData.Length = 28 Then
                        If Mid(sRecvData, 11, 1) = "E" Then
                            Label_RF_READ2.Text = Mid(sRecvData, 11, 16)
                            ' 채널2 RFID 태그ID 최초 캡처
                            If RFID_TAG_ID2 = "" Then RFID_TAG_ID2 = Mid(sRecvData, 11, 16)
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ2.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                    Else
                        Label_RF_READ2.Text = "Empty"
                    End If
                    sRecvData = ""
                    Serial_RFID2.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If
            End If
        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String
        Dim ToolData As Double

        Do While Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool.ReadChar
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0061" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            ToolData = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String, 146, 2))))

                            If wStep2 = 6 Then

                                If srcSABTQ1_DEC.Text <> "OK" And srcSABTQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then

                                    srcSABTQ1.Text = ToolData
                                    If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        srcSABTQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                        srcSABTQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcSABTQ1_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                        srcSABTQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If

                                ElseIf srcSABTQ1_DEC.Text = "OK" And srcSABTQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then

                                    srcSABTQ2.Text = ToolData
                                    If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        srcSABTQ2_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                        srcSABTQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        srcSABTQ_DEc.Text = "OK"
                                        srcSABTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcSABTQ2_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                        srcSABTQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If

                                End If

                            ElseIf wStep2 = 6.1 Then

                                If srcCSABTQ1_DEC.Text <> "OK" And srcCSABTQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then

                                    srcCSABTQ1.Text = ToolData
                                    If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        srcCSABTQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                        srcCSABTQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcCSABTQ1_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                        srcCSABTQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If

                                ElseIf srcCSABTQ1_DEC.Text = "OK" And srcCSABTQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then

                                    srcCSABTQ2.Text = ToolData
                                    If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        srcCSABTQ2_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                        srcCSABTQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        srcCSABTQ_DEc.Text = "OK"
                                        srcCSABTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcCSABTQ2_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                        srcCSABTQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If

                                End If

                            End If

                        End If

                        Tool_String = ""
                        Serial_Tool.DiscardInBuffer()

                    Else

                        Tool_String = Tool_String & Chr(Incoming1)

                    End If

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                Incoming1 = ""
                Tool_String = ""
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect1.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If

        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.5
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            If FLAG_RFID1_RUN = True Then Read_RFiD1()
            If FLAG_RFID2_RUN = True Then Read_RFiD2()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If


    End Sub

    Private Sub Read_RFiD1()
        If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen = True Then
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID1.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub Read_RFiD2()
        If Serial_RFID2.IsOpen = True Then
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID2.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If
    End Sub

                                "D4153" & vbLf &
                                "D4154" & vbLf &
                                "D4155" & vbLf &
                                "D4156" & vbLf &
                                "D4157" & vbLf &
                                "D4158" & vbLf &
                                "D4159" & vbLf &
                                "D4160" & vbLf &
                                "D4161" & vbLf &
                                "D4250" & vbLf &
                                "D4251" & vbLf &
                                "D4252" & vbLf &
                                "D4253" & vbLf &
                                "D4254" & vbLf &
                                "D4255" & vbLf &
                                "D4256" & vbLf &
                                "D4257" & vbLf &
                                "D4258" & vbLf &
                                "D4259" & vbLf &
                                "D4260" & vbLf &
                                "D4261"
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For j = 0 To 23
                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 23
                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 24)
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next

            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        ' 재진입 방지 (ADODB COM 호출 중 메시지 펌프로 다른 Tick 진입 차단)
        If tmr1Busy Then Exit Sub
        tmr1Busy = True

        Try

        Label_Step1.Text = wStep1

        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep1 <> 0 Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4150", "0000000000")
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4160", "0")
            Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
            wStep1 = 0
        End If

        FLAG_RFID1_RUN = True

        If wStep1 = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then
                wStep1 = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
            RFID_TAG_ID1 = "" ' 채널1 태그ID 초기화
            wStep1 = 3

        ElseIf wStep1 = 3 Then

            If RFID_TAG_ID1.Length = 16 Then
                Try
                    Dim serial1 As String = LoadPallet(RFID_TAG_ID1)
                    If serial1 = "" Then
                        PLC_WRITE("D", "4150", "2") 'PASS
                        wStep1 = 100
                    Else
                        srcSerialNumber1.Text = serial1
                        srcColorCode_1.Text = ""
                        Load_PArt1(Mid(serial1, 13, 11))
                        ' 칼라코드 추출
                        If Len(serial1) > 23 Then
                            srcColorCode_1.Text = Mid(serial1, 24)
                        End If
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                    ' 실패 시 wStep1 유지 - 자동 재시도
                End Try
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING1 = "0000000000"
            If OPTION_RECL1 = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL1 = "EMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL1 = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL1 = "IMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If
            If OPTION_LHRH1 = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH1 = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If TARGET_SAB_SN1 = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 5, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 5, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_VENT1 = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If OPTION_LSUPT1 = "2WAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 7, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 7, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "CN7" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "AD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "AE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "3"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "PD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "4"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE1 = "CN8" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "5"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING1, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4150", PLC_STRING1)
            wStep1 = 5

        ElseIf wStep1 = 5 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(24) = 1 Then 'D4150
                wStep1 = 6
            Else
                wStep1 = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 6 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4151", "1")
            wStep1 = 7

        ElseIf wStep1 = 7 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(25) = 1 Then 'D4151
                wStep1 = 8
            Else
                wStep1 = 6
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 8 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4150", "0000000000")
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4160", "0")
                Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
                wStep1 = 0
            End If

        ElseIf wStep1 = 100 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(24) = 2 Then
                ' 채널2가 작업 중이면 강제 리셋하지 않음 (충돌 방지)
                If wStep2 = 0 Then wStep1 = 0
            Else
                wStep1 = 3
            End If

        End If

        Finally
            tmr1Busy = False
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work2_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work2.Tick

        ' 재진입 방지
        If tmr2Busy Then Exit Sub
        tmr2Busy = True

        Try

        Label_Step2.Text = wStep2

        If PLC_VALUE(12) = 0 And wStep2 <> 0 Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ2.Text = ""
            wStep2 = 0
        End If

        FLAG_RFID2_RUN = True

        If wStep2 = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(12) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(13) = 1 Then
                wStep2 = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ2.Text = ""
            RFID_TAG_ID2 = "" ' 채널2 태그ID 초기화
            wStep2 = 3

        ElseIf wStep2 = 3 Then

            If RFID_TAG_ID2.Length = 16 Then
                Try
                    Dim serial2 As String = LoadPallet(RFID_TAG_ID2)
                    If serial2 = "" Then
                        Init_Control()
                        PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", "2") 'PASS
                        wStep2 = 100
                    Else
                        Init_Control()
                        srcSerialNumber2.Text = serial2
                        Load_PArt2(Mid(serial2, 13, 11))
                        ' 칼라코드 추출 (Init_Control에서 이미 ""로 초기화됨)
                        If Len(serial2) > 23 Then
                            srcColorCode2.Text = Mid(serial2, 24)
                        End If
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                    ' 실패 시 wStep2 유지 - 자동 재시도
                End Try
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING2 = "0000000000"

            If OPTION_RECL2 = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL2 = "EMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL2 = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL2 = "IMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If

            If OPTION_LHRH2 = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH2 = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If TARGET_SAB_SN2 = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 5, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 5, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_VENT2 = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If OPTION_LSUPT2 = "2WAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 7, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 7, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "AD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "AE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "3"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "PD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "4"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING2, 8, 1) = "5"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING2, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", PLC_STRING2)
            wStep2 = 5

        ElseIf wStep2 = 5 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(36) = 1 Then
                wStep2 = 6
            Else
                wStep2 = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 6 Then 'SAB 시리얼 및 토크작업

            If (OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8") And TARGET_SAB_SN2 <> "0" And FUNCTION_SAB_RESIST = True Then
                If REsist_Send = False Then Request_Resist()
            End If

            If (srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcSABTQ_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcSABTQ_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcSABTQ_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcSABResist_DEc.Text = "NA") And
                (srcSabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "OK" Or srcSabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "NA") Then
                ' SAB 완료 → CSAB 작업 시작
                wStep2 = 6.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 6.1 Then 'CSAB 시리얼 및 토크작업

            If (OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8") And TARGET_CSAB_SN2 <> "0" And TARGET_CSAB_SN2 <> "" And FUNCTION_CSAB_RESIST = True Then
                If REsist_Send = False Then Request_Resist()
            End If

            If (srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcCSABBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcCSABTQ_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcCSABTQ_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcCSABTQ_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcCSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcCSABResist_DEc.Text = "NA") And
                (srcCsabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "OK" Or srcCsabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "NA") Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                wStep2 = 7
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 7 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4251", "1")
            wStep2 = 8

        ElseIf wStep2 = 8 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(37) = 1 Then
                wStep2 = 9
            Else
                wStep2 = 7
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 9 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(14) = 1 Then
                Try
                    Save_DB(srcSerialNumber2.Text)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    ' 실패 시 wStep2 유지 - 자동 재시도
                End Try
                wStep2 = 10
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 10 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(12) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ2.Text = ""
                wStep2 = 0
            End If

        ElseIf wStep2 = 100 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(36) = 2 Then
                wStep2 = 0
            Else
                wStep2 = 3
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub tmr_Tool_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_Tool.Tick
        If Tool_Connection = False Then
            Tool_Connection = True
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "002099990010" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        ElseIf Tool_Connection = True Then
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3") &
            Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub Serial_Resist_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Resist.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming3 As String
        Dim tmp As String

        Incoming3 = Serial_Resist.ReadLine()
        tmp = Mid$(Incoming3, 1, Len(Incoming3) - 1)

        label_Message.Text = tmp

        If (OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8") And TARGET_SAB_SN2 <> "0" And FUNCTION_SAB_RESIST = True And wStep2 = 6 Then

            If REsist_Send = True Then

                If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+20" Or Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+30" Then
                    If srcSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
                        srcSabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "OK"
                        srcSabResistConnectorCheck.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    End If
                    label_Message.Text = "No Connection"
                Else
                    If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "-03" Then
                        label_Message.Text = Format(Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)) / 100, "0.00")
                    ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+00" Then
                        label_Message.Text = Format(Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)), "0.00")
                    End If

                    If srcSABResist1_DEc.Text <> "OK" Then
                        If (CDbl(label_Message.Text) >= (BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN)) And (CDbl(label_Message.Text) <= (BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX)) Then
                            srcSABResist1.Text = label_Message.Text
                            srcSABResist1_DEc.Text = "OK"
                            srcSABResist1_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            srcSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK"
                            srcSABResist_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                            PLC_WRITE("D", "4160", "1")
                        End If
                    End If

                End If
                REsist_Send = False
            End If

        ElseIf (OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE2 = "CN8") And TARGET_CSAB_SN2 <> "0" And TARGET_CSAB_SN2 <> "" And FUNCTION_CSAB_RESIST = True And wStep2 = 6.1 Then

            If REsist_Send = True Then

                If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+20" Or Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+30" Then
                    If srcCSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
                        srcCsabResistConnectorCheck.Text = "OK"
                        srcCsabResistConnectorCheck.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    End If
                    label_Message.Text = "No Connection"
                Else
                    If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "-03" Then
                        label_Message.Text = Format(Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)) / 100, "0.00")
                    ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+00" Then
                        label_Message.Text = Format(Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)), "0.00")
                    End If

                    If srcCSABResist1_DEc.Text <> "OK" Then
                        If (CDbl(label_Message.Text) >= (BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN)) And (CDbl(label_Message.Text) <= (BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX)) Then
                            srcCSABResist1.Text = label_Message.Text
                            srcCSABResist1_DEc.Text = "OK"
                            srcCSABResist1_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            srcCSABResist_DEc.Text = "OK"
                            srcCSABResist_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                            PLC_WRITE("D", "4160", "1")
                        End If
                    End If

                End If
                REsist_Send = False
            End If

        End If


    End Sub

    ' MX Component ActiveX 동적 생성 (디자이너 깨짐 방지)
    Private Sub InitializeActPlc()
        Try
            ACT_PLC1 = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
            CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
            ACT_PLC1.Enabled = True
            ACT_PLC1.Location = New System.Drawing.Point(1735, 35)
            ACT_PLC1.Name = "ACT_PLC1"
            ACT_PLC1.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(32, 32)
            ACT_PLC1.Visible = False
            Me.Panel6.Controls.Add(ACT_PLC1)
            CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("ACT_PLC1 초기화 실패: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' 팔레트 조회
    Private Function LoadPallet(ByVal strPalletID As String) As String
        Dim serial As String = ""
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                serial = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing AndAlso Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex2 As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
        Return serial
    End Function

End Class

Imports System.ComponentModel

Public Class FrmMain

    Private RF_READ_DELAY As Double
    Private RF_READ_COUNT As Double

    Private PLC_STRING1 As String
    Private PLC_STRING2 As String

    Private Tmr_Count As Double
    Private FLAG_RFID1_RUN As Boolean
    Private FLAG_RFID2_RUN As Boolean

    ' RFID 태그ID 최초 캡처용 변수
    Private RFID_TAG_ID1 As String = ""
    Private RFID_TAG_ID2 As String = ""

    Private Tool_Delay_count As Double
    Private Tool_Ready As Boolean
    Private Tool_String As String
    Private Tool_Connection As Boolean

    Private tError1 As String
    Private tStep1 As String

    Private FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 As Boolean
    Private ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 As String

    Private OPTION_CARTYPE1 As String
    Private OPTION_LHRH1 As String
    Private OPTION_RECL1 As String
    Private OPTION_VENT1 As Boolean
    Private OPTION_LSUPT1 As String

    Private TARGET_SAB_SN1 As String
    Private TARGET_LSUPT_SN1 As String
    Private TARGET_RECL_SN1 As String
    
    Private OPTION_CARTYPE2 As String
    Private OPTION_LHRH2 As String
    Private OPTION_RECL2 As String
    Private OPTION_VENT2 As Boolean
    Private OPTION_LSUPT2 As String

    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As FlexCell.Grid)

        Dim i As Integer
        With GridName

            'GridName.Visible = False
            .AutoRedraw = False
            .AllowUserPaste = FlexCell.ClipboardDataEnum.Text
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.Columns
            .AllowUserSort = True
            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .ExtendLastCol = True
            .SelectionMode = FlexCell.SelectionModeEnum.ByCell
            .SortIndicatorColor = Color.White
            .BoldFixedCell = False
            '.AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .Cols = 4

            .Column(0).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(1).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(2).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(3).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 60
            .Column(2).Width = 80
            .Column(3).Width = 100

            .Rows = 1
            .DefaultRowHeight = 0

            For i = 0 To .Rows - 1
                .Cell(i, 0).Text = ""
                .Cell(i, 1).Text = "No."
                .Cell(i, 2).Text = "I/O"
                .Cell(i, 3).Text = "Dec."
            Next

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub
